text:
aañkh se duur na ho dil se utar jā.egā
vaqt kā kyā hai guzartā hai guzar jā.egā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
āshiqī meñ 'mīr' jaise ḳhvāb mat dekhā karo
bāvle ho jāoge mahtāb mat dekhā karo
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ab aur kyā kisī se marāsim baḌhā.eñ ham
ye bhī bahut hai tujh ko agar bhuul jaa.eñ ham
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ab ke ham bichhḌe to shāyad kabhī ḳhvāboñ meñ mileñ
jis tarah sūkhe hue phuul kitāboñ meñ mileñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ab ke tajdīd-e-vafā kā nahīñ imkāñ jānāñ
yaad kyā tujh ko dilā.eñ tirā paimāñ jānāñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ab kyā socheñ kyā hālāt the kis kāran ye zahr piyā hai
ham ne us ke shahr ko chhoḌā aur āñkhoñ ko muuñd liyā hai
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ab shauq se ki jaañ se guzar jaanā chāhiye
bol ai havā-e-shahr kidhar jaanā chāhiye
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
abhī kuchh aur karishme ġhazal ke dekhte haiñ
'farāz' ab zarā lahja badal ke dekhte haiñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
agarche zor havāoñ ne Daal rakkhā hai
magar charāġh ne lau ko sambhāl rakkhā hai
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
aisā hai ki sab ḳhvāb musalsal nahīñ hote
jo aaj to hote haiñ magar kal nahīñ hote
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
aise chup haiñ ki ye manzil bhī kaḌī ho jaise
terā milnā bhī judā.ī kī ghaḌī ho jaise
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ajab junūn-e-masāfat meñ ghar se niklā thā
ḳhabar nahīñ hai ki sūraj kidhar se niklā thā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
avval avval kī dostī hai abhī
ik ġhazal hai ki ho rahī hai abhī
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
dost ban kar bhī nahīñ saath nibhāne vaalā
vahī andāz hai zālim kā zamāne vaalā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
dukh fasāna nahīñ ki tujh se kaheñ
dil bhī maanā nahīñ ki tujh se kaheñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
guftugū achchhī lagī zauq-e-nazar achchhā lagā
muddatoñ ke baad koī ham-safar achchhā lagā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
har koī dil kī hathelī pe hai sahrā rakkhe
kis ko sairāb kare vo kise pyāsā rakkhe
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
havā ke zor se pindār-e-bām-o-dar bhī gayā
charāġh ko jo bachāte the un kā ghar bhī gayā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
huī hai shaam to āñkhoñ meñ bas gayā phir tū
kahāñ gayā hai mire shahr ke musāfir tū
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
is qadar musalsal thiiñ shiddateñ judā.ī kī
aaj pahlī baar us se maiñ ne bevafā.ī kī
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
is se pahle ki be-vafā ho jaa.eñ
kyuuñ na ai dost ham judā ho jaa.eñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
jab bhī dil khol ke ro.e hoñge
log ārām se so.e hoñge
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
jis samt bhī dekhūñ nazar aatā hai ki tum ho
ai jān-e-jahāñ ye koī tum sā hai ki tum ho
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
jo ġhair the vo isī baat par hamāre hue
ki ham se dost bahut be-ḳhabar hamāre hue
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
juz tire koī bhī din raat na jaane mere
tū kahāñ hai magar ai dost purāne mere
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
karūñ na yaad magar kis tarah bhulā.ūñ use
ġhazal bahāna karūñ aur gungunā.ūñ use
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
kaThin hai rāhguzar thoḌī duur saath chalo
bahut kaḌā hai safar thoḌī duur saath chalo
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ḳhāmosh ho kyuuñ dād-e-jafā kyuuñ nahīñ dete
bismil ho to qātil ko duā kyuuñ nahīñ dete
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
kyā aise kam-suḳhan se koī guftugū kare
jo mustaqil sukūt se dil ko lahū kare
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
maiñ to maqtal meñ bhī qismat kā sikandar niklā
qur.a-e-fāl mire naam kā aksar niklā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
phir usī rahguzār par shāyad
ham kabhī mil sakeñ magar shāyad
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
qurbat bhī nahīñ dil se utar bhī nahīñ jaatā
vo shaḳhs koī faisla kar bhī nahīñ jaatā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
qurbatoñ meñ bhī judā.ī ke zamāne māñge
dil vo be-mehr ki rone ke bahāne māñge
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ranjish hī sahī dil hī dukhāne ke liye aa
aa phir se mujhe chhoḌ ke jaane ke liye aa
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
rog aise bhī ġham-e-yār se lag jaate haiñ
dar se uThte haiñ to dīvār se lag jaate haiñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
sāmne us ke kabhī us kī satā.ish nahīñ kī
dil ne chāhā bhī agar hoñToñ ne jumbish nahīñ kī
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
sāqiyā ek nazar jaam se pahle pahle
ham ko jaanā hai kahīñ shaam se pahle pahle
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
sho.ala thā jal-bujhā huuñ havā.eñ mujhe na do
maiñ kab kā jā chukā huuñ sadā.eñ mujhe na do
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
silsile toḌ gayā vo sabhī jaate jaate
varna itne to marāsim the ki aate jaate
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
sunā hai log use aañkh bhar ke dekhte haiñ
so us ke shahr meñ kuchh din Thahar ke dekhte haiñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
tere qarīb aa ke baḌī uljhanoñ meñ huuñ
maiñ dushmanoñ meñ huuñ ki tire dostoñ meñ huuñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
terī bāteñ hī sunāne aa.e
dost bhī dil hī dukhāne aa.e
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
tujh se mil kar to ye lagtā hai ki ai ajnabī dost
tū mirī pahlī mohabbat thī mirī āḳhirī dost
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
tujhe hai mashq-e-sitam kā malāl vaise hī
hamārī jaan thī jaañ par vabāl vaise hī
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
us ko judā hue bhī zamāna bahut huā
ab kyā kaheñ ye qissa purānā bahut huā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
us ne sukūt-e-shab meñ bhī apnā payām rakh diyā
hijr kī raat baam par māh-e-tamām rakh diyā
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
vahshateñ baḌhtī ga.iiñ hijr ke āzār ke saath
ab to ham baat bhī karte nahīñ ġham-ḳhvār ke saath
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
ye kyā ki sab se bayāñ dil kī hālateñ karnī
'farāz' tujh ko na aa.iiñ mohabbateñ karnī
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
yūñhī mar mar ke ji.eñ vaqt guzāre jaa.eñ
zindagī ham tire hāthoñ se na maare jaa.eñ
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
zindagī se yahī gila hai mujhe
tū bahut der se milā hai mujhe
author: — ahmad faraz

text:
aah jo dil se nikālī jā.egī
kyā samajhte ho ki ḳhālī jā.egī
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
aaj ārā.ish-e-gesū-e-dotā hotī hai
phir mirī jaan giraftār-e-balā hotī hai
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
āñkheñ mujhe talvoñ se vo malne nahīñ dete
armān mire dil ke nikalne nahīñ dete
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
agar dil vāqif-e-nairañgī-e-tab-e-sanam hotā
zamāne kī do-rañgī kā use hargiz na ġham hotā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
apne pahlū se vo ġhairoñ ko uThā hī na sake
un ko ham qissa-e-ġham apnā sunā hī na sake
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
apnī girah se kuchh na mujhe aap dījiye
aḳhbār meñ to naam mirā chhāp dījiye
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
bahut rahā hai kabhī lutf-e-yār ham par bhī
guzar chukī hai ye fasl-e-bahār ham par bhī
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
be-takalluf bosa-e-zulf-e-chalīpā lījiye
naqd-e-dil maujūd hai phir kyuuñ na saudā lījiye
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
bi.Thā.ī jā.eñgī parde meñ bībayāñ kab tak
bane rahoge tum is mulk meñ miyāñ kab tak
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
charḳh se kuchh umiid thī hī nahīñ
aarzū maiñ ne koī kī hī nahīñ
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
dard to maujūd hai dil meñ davā ho yā na ho
bandagī hālat se zāhir hai ḳhudā ho yā na ho
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
dil-e-māyūs meñ vo shorisheñ barpā nahīñ hotīñ
umīdeñ is qadar TūTīñ ki ab paidā nahīñ hotīñ
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
dil ho ḳharāb diin pe jo kuchh asar paḌe
ab kār-e-āshiqī to bahar-kaif kar paḌe
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
dil mirā jis se bahaltā koī aisā na milā
but ke bande mile allāh kā bandā na milā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
duniyā meñ huuñ duniyā kā talabgār nahīñ huuñ
bāzār se guzrā huuñ ḳharīdār nahīñ huuñ
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
falsafī ko bahs ke andar ḳhudā miltā nahīñ
Dor ko suljhā rahā hai aur sirā miltā nahīñ
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
gale lagā.eñ kareñ pyaar tum ko eid ke din
idhar to aao mire gul-ezār eid ke din
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ġhamza nahīñ hotā ki ishārā nahīñ hotā
aañkh un se jo miltī hai to kyā kyā nahīñ hotā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
hāl-e-dil maiñ sunā nahīñ saktā
lafz ma.anā ko pā nahīñ saktā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
halqe nahīñ haiñ zulf ke halqe haiñ jaal ke
haañ ai nigāh-e-shauq zarā dekh-bhāl ke
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
hañgāma hai kyuuñ barpā thoḌī sī jo pī lī hai
Daakā to nahīñ maarā chorī to nahīñ kī hai
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
har qadam kahtā hai tū aayā hai jaane ke liye
manzil-e-hastī nahīñ hai dil lagāne ke liye
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
havā-e-shab bhī hai ambar-afshāñ uruuj bhī hai mah-e-mubīñ kā
nisār hone kī do ijāzat mahal nahīñ hai nahīñ nahīñ kā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
hayā se sar jhukā lenā adā se muskurā denā
hasīnoñ ko bhī kitnā sahl hai bijlī girā denā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
huuñ maiñ parvāna magar sham.a to ho raat to ho
jaan dene ko huuñ maujūd koī baat to ho
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ik bosa dījiye mirā īmān lījiye
go but haiñ aap bahr-e-ḳhudā maan lījiye
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ishq-e-but meñ kufr kā mujh ko adab karnā paḌā
jo barhaman ne kahā āḳhir vo sab karnā paḌā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
jab yaas huī to aahoñ ne siine se nikalnā chhoḌ diyā
ab ḳhushk-mizāj āñhkeñ bhī huiiñ dil ne bhī machalnā chhoḌ diyā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
jahāñ meñ haal mirā is qadar zabūn huā
ki mujh ko dekh ke bismil ko bhī sukūn huā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
jazba-e-dil ne mire tāsīr dikhlā.ī to hai
ghuñgrūoñ kī jānib-e-dar kuchh sadā aa.ī to hai
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
jo tumhāre lab-e-jāñ-baḳhsh kā shaidā hogā
uTh bhī jā.egā jahāñ se to masīhā hogā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
kahāñ vo ab lutf-e-bāhamī hai mohabbatoñ meñ bahut kamī hai
chalī hai kaisī havā ilāhī ki har tabī.at meñ barhamī hai
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ḳhatm kiyā sabā ne raqs gul pe nisār ho chukī
josh-e-nashāt ho chukā saut-e-hazār ho chukī
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ḳhudā alī-gaḌh ke madrase ko tamām amrāz se shifā de
bhare hue haiñ ra.īs-zāde amīr-zāde sharīf-zāde
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ḳhushī hai sab ko ki operation meñ ḳhuub nishtar ye chal rahā hai
kisī ko is kī ḳhabar nahīñ hai marīz kā dam nikal rahā hai
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
kyā jāniye sayyad the haq āgāh kahāñ tak
samjhe na ki sīdhī hai mirī raah kahāñ tak
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ma.anī ko bhulā detī hai sūrat hai to ye hai
nature bhī sabaq siikh le zīnat hai to ye hai
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
na bahte ashk to tāsīr meñ sivā hote
sadaf meñ rahte ye motī to be-bahā hote
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
na hāsil huā sabr-o-ārām dil kā
na niklā kabhī tum se kuchh kaam dil kā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
na rūh-e-maz.hab na qalb-e-ārif na shā.irāna zabān baaqī
zamīñ hamārī badal ga.ī hai agarche hai āsmān baaqī
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
phir ga.ī aap kī do din meñ tabī.at kaisī
ye vafā kaisī thī sāhab ye muravvat kaisī
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
rañg-e-sharāb se mirī niyyat badal ga.ī
vaa.iz kī baat rah ga.ī saaqī kī chal ga.ī
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
saañs lete hue bhī Dartā huuñ
ye na samjheñ ki aah kartā huuñ
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
sheḳh ne nāqūs ke sur meñ jo ḳhud hī taan lī
phir to yāroñ ne bhajan gaane kī khul kar Thaan lī
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
tarīq-e-ishq meñ mujh ko koī kāmil nahīñ miltā
ga.e farhād o majnūñ ab kisī se dil nahīñ miltā
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
tirī zulfoñ meñ dil uljhā huā hai
balā ke pech meñ aayā huā hai
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ummīd TuuTī huī hai merī jo dil mirā thā vo mar chukā hai
jo zindagānī ko talḳh kar de vo vaqt mujh par guzar chukā hai
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
unheñ nigāh hai apne jamāl hī kī taraf
nazar uThā ke nahīñ dekhte kisī kī taraf
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
vo havā na rahī vo chaman na rahā vo galī na rahī vo hasīñ na rahe
vo falak na rahā vo samāñ na rahā vo makāñ na rahe vo makīñ na rahe
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
zid hai unheñ puurā mirā armāñ na kareñge
muñh se jo nahīñ niklī hai ab haañ na kareñge
author: — akbar allahabadi

text:
ālam-e-āb-o-ḳhāk-o-bād sirr-e-ayāñ hai tū ki maiñ
vo jo nazar se hai nihāñ us kā jahāñ hai tū ki maiñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
aflāk se aatā hai nāloñ kā javāb āḳhir
karte haiñ ḳhitāb āḳhir uThte haiñ hijāb āḳhir
author: — allama iqbal

text:
agar kaj-rau haiñ anjum āsmāñ terā hai yā merā
mujhe fikr-e-jahāñ kyuuñ ho jahāñ terā hai yā merā
author: — allama iqbal

text:
anokhī vaz.a hai saare zamāne se nirāle haiñ
ye āshiq kaun sī bastī ke yā-rab rahne vaale haiñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
apnī jaulāñ-gāh zer-e-āsmāñ samjhā thā maiñ
aab o gil ke khel ko apnā jahāñ samjhā thā maiñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
aql go āstāñ se duur nahīñ
us kī taqdīr meñ huzūr nahīñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
asar kare na kare sun to le mirī fariyād
nahīñ hai daad kā tālib ye banda-e-āzād
author: — allama iqbal

text:
DhūñD rahā hai farañg aish-e-jahāñ kā davām
vā-e-tamannā-e-ḳhām vā-e-tamannā-e-ḳhām
author: — allama iqbal

text:
digar-gūñ hai jahāñ tāroñ kī gardish tez hai saaqī
dil-e-har-zarra meñ ġhauġhā-e-rustā-ḳhez hai saaqī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
dil soz se ḳhālī hai nigah paak nahīñ hai
phir is meñ ajab kyā ki tū bebāk nahīñ hai
author: — allama iqbal

text:
ejaaz hai kisī kā yā gardish-e-zamāna
TuuTā hai asia meñ sehr-e-firañgiyāna
author: — allama iqbal

text:
fitrat ko ḳhirad ke rū-ba-rū kar
tasḳhīr-e-maqām-e-rañg-o-bū kar
author: — allama iqbal

text:
gesū-e-tābdār ko aur bhī tābdār kar
hosh o ḳhirad shikār kar qalb o nazar shikār kar
author: — allama iqbal

text:
gulzār-e-hast-e-būd na begāna-vār dekh
hai dekhne kī chiiz ise baar baar dekh
author: — allama iqbal

text:
har shai musāfir har chiiz raahī
kyā chāñd taare kyā murġh o maahī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
hazār ḳhauf ho lekin zabāñ ho dil kī rafīq
yahī rahā hai azal se qalandaroñ kā tarīq
author: — allama iqbal

text:
ik dānish-e-nūrānī ik dānish-e-burhānī
hai dānish-e-burhānī hairat kī farāvānī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
ishq se paidā navā-e-zindagī meñ zer-o-bam
ishq se miTTī kī tasvīroñ meñ soz-e-dam-ba-dam
author: — allama iqbal

text:
jab ishq sikhātā hai ādāb-e-ḳhud-āgāhī
khulte haiñ ġhulāmoñ par asrār-e-shahanshāhī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
kabhī ai haqīqat-e-muntazar nazar aa libās-e-majāz meñ
ki hazāroñ sajde taḌap rahe haiñ mirī jabīn-e-niyāz meñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
ḳhirad ke paas ḳhabar ke sivā kuchh aur nahīñ
tirā ilaaj nazar ke sivā kuchh aur nahīñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
ḳhird-mandoñ se kyā pūchhūñ ki merī ibtidā kyā hai
ki maiñ is fikr meñ rahtā huuñ merī intihā kyā hai
author: — allama iqbal

text:
ḳhudī ho ilm se mohkam to ġhairat-e-jibrīl
agar ho ishq se mohkam to sūr-e-isrāfīl
author: — allama iqbal

text:
ḳhudī vo bahr hai jis kā koī kināra nahīñ
tū aabjū ise samjhā agar to chāra nahīñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
kī haq se farishtoñ ne 'iqbāl' kī ġhammāzī
gustāḳh hai kartā hai fitrat kī hinā-bandī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
kushāda dast-e-karam jab vo be-niyāz kare
niyāz-mand na kyuuñ ājizī pe naaz kare
author: — allama iqbal

text:
lā phir ik baar vahī baada o jaam ai saaqī
haath aa jaa.e mujhe merā maqām ai saaqī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
majnūñ ne shahr chhoḌā to sahrā bhī chhoḌ de
nazzāre kī havas ho to lailā bhī chhoḌ de
author: — allama iqbal

text:
matā-e-be-bahā hai dard-o-soz-e-ārzūmandī
maqām-e-bandagī de kar na luuñ shān-e-ḳhudāvandī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
merī navā-e-shauq se shor harīm-e-zāt meñ
ġhulġhula-hā-e-al-amāñ but-kada-e-sifāt meñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
musalmāñ ke lahū meñ hai salīqa dil-navāzī kā
muravvat husn-e-ālam-gīr hai mardān-e-ġhāzī kā
author: — allama iqbal

text:
na aate hameñ is meñ takrār kyā thī
magar va.ada karte hue aar kyā thī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
na taḳht-o-tāj meñ ne lashkar-o-sipāh meñ hai
jo baat mard-e-qalandar kī bārgāh meñ hai
author: — allama iqbal

text:
na tū zamīñ ke liye hai na āsmāñ ke liye
jahāñ hai tere liye tū nahīñ jahāñ ke liye
author: — allama iqbal

text:
naala hai bulbul-e-shorīda tirā ḳhaam abhī
apne siine meñ ise aur zarā thaam abhī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
nigāh-e-faqr meñ shān-e-sikandarī kyā hai
ḳhirāj kī jo gadā ho vo qaisarī kyā hai
author: — allama iqbal

text:
pareshāñ ho ke merī ḳhaak āḳhir dil na ban jaa.e
jo mushkil ab hai yā rab phir vahī mushkil na ban jaa.e
author: — allama iqbal

text:
phir charāġh-e-lāla se raushan hue koh o daman
mujh ko phir naġhmoñ pe uksāne lagā murġh-e-chaman
author: — allama iqbal

text:
saḳhtiyāñ kartā huuñ dil par ġhair se ġhāfil huuñ maiñ
haa.e kyā achchhī kahī zālim huuñ maiñ jāhil huuñ maiñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
samā saktā nahīñ pahnā-e-fitrat meñ mirā saudā
ġhalat thā ai junūñ shāyad tirā andāza-e-sahrā
author: — allama iqbal

text:
sitāroñ se aage jahāñ aur bhī haiñ
abhī ishq ke imtihāñ aur bhī haiñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
tire ishq kī intihā chāhtā huuñ
mirī sādgī dekh kyā chāhtā huuñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
tujhe yaad kyā nahīñ hai mire dil kā vo zamāna
vo adab-gah-e-mohabbat vo nigah kā tāziyāna
author: — allama iqbal

text:
tū abhī rahguzar meñ hai qaid-e-maqām se guzar
misr o hijāz se guzar pāras o shaam se guzar
author: — allama iqbal

text:
vahī merī kam-nasībī vahī terī be-niyāzī
mire kaam kuchh na aayā ye kamāl-e-nai-navāzī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
vo harf-e-rāz ki mujh ko sikhā gayā hai junūñ
ḳhudā mujhe nafas-e-jabra.īl de to kahūñ
author: — allama iqbal

text:
yā rab ye jahān-e-guzarāñ ḳhuub hai lekin
kyuuñ ḳhvār haiñ mardān-e-safā-kesh o hunar-mand
author: — allama iqbal

text:
ye payām de ga.ī hai mujhe bād-e-sub.h-gāhī
ki ḳhudī ke ārifoñ kā hai maqām pādshāhī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
zāhir ki aañkh se na tamāshā kare koī
ho dekhnā to dīda-e-dil vā kare koī
author: — allama iqbal

text:
zamāna aayā hai be-hijābī kā aam dīdār-e-yār hogā
sukūt thā parda-dār jis kā vo raaz ab āshkār hogā
author: — allama iqbal

text:
aage baḌhe na qissa-e-ishq-e-butāñ se ham
sab kuchh kahā magar na khule rāzdāñ se ham
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
ab vo aglā sā iltifāt nahīñ
jis pe bhūle the ham vo baat nahīñ
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
baat kuchh ham se ban na aa.ī aaj
bol kar ham ne muñh kī khaa.ī aaj
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
burī aur bhalī sab guzar jā.egī
ye kashtī yūñhī paar utar jā.egī
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
dhuum thī apnī pārsā.ī kī
kī bhī aur kis se āshnā.ī kī
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
dil ko dard-āshnā kiyā tū ne
dard-e-dil ko davā kiyā tū ne
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
dil se ḳhayāl-e-dost bhulāyā na jā.egā
siine meñ daaġh hai ki miTāyā na jā.egā
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
ġham-e-furqat hī meñ marnā ho to dushvār nahīñ
shādi-e-vasl bhī āshiq ko sazā-vār nahīñ
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
ghar hai vahshat-ḳhez aur bastī ujaaḌ
ho ga.ī ek ik ghaḌī tujh bin pahāḌ
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
go javānī meñ thī kaj-rā.ī bahut
par javānī ham ko yaad aa.ī bahut
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
hai justujū ki ḳhuub se hai ḳhūb-tar kahāñ
ab Thahartī hai dekhiye jā kar nazar kahāñ
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
hai ye takiya tirī atāoñ par
vahī isrār hai ḳhatāoñ par
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
haq vafā ke jo ham jatāne lage
aap kuchh kah ke muskurāne lage
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
haqīqat mahram-e-asrār se pūchh
mazā añgūr kā mai-ḳhvār se pūchh
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
hashr tak yaañ dil shakebā chāhiye
kab mileñ dilbar se dekhā chāhiye
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
ishq ko tark-e-junūñ se kyā ġharaz
charḳh-e-gardāñ ko sukūñ se kyā ġharaz
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
jiite jī maut ke tum muñh meñ na jaanā hargiz
dosto dil na lagānā na lagānā hargiz
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
junūñ kār-farmā huā chāhtā hai
qadam dasht paimā huā chāhtā hai
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
kabk o qumrī meñ hai jhagḌā ki chaman kis kā hai
kal batā degī ḳhizāñ ye ki vatan kis kā hai
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
kah do koī saaqī se ki ham marte haiñ pyāse
gar mai nahīñ de zahr hī kā jaam balā se
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
kar ke bīmār dī davā tū ne
jaan se pahle dil liyā tū ne
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
ḳhūbiyāñ apne meñ go be-intihā paate haiñ ham
par har ik ḳhūbī meñ daaġh ik aib kā paate haiñ ham
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
koī mahram nahīñ miltā jahāñ meñ
mujhe kahnā hai kuchh apnī zabāñ meñ
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
maiñ to maiñ ġhair ko marne se ab inkār nahīñ
ik qayāmat hai tire haath meñ talvār nahīñ
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
ranj aur ranj bhī tanhā.ī kā
vaqt pahuñchā mirī rusvā.ī kā
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
us ke jaate hī ye kyā ho ga.ī ghar kī sūrat
na vo dīvār kī sūrat hai na dar kī sūrat
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
vaañ agar jaa.eñ to le kar jaa.eñ kyā
muñh use ham jā ke ye dikhlā.eñ kyā
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
vasl kā us ke dil-e-zār tamannā.ī hai
na mulāqāt hai jis se na shanāsā.ī hai
author: — altaf hussain hali

text:
ze-hāl-e-miskīñ makun taġhāful durā.e naināñ banā.e batiyāñ
ki tāb-e-hijrāñ nadāram ai jaañ na lehū kaahe lagā.e chhatiyāñ
author: — ameer khusrau

text:
baat karnī mujhe mushkil kabhī aisī to na thī
jaisī ab hai tirī mahfil kabhī aisī to na thī
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
bharī hai dil meñ jo hasrat kahūñ to kis se kahūñ
sune hai kaun musībat kahūñ to kis se kahūñ
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
dekh dil ko mire o kāfir-e-be-pīr na toḌ
ghar hai allāh kā ye is kī to ta.amīr na toḌ
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
dekho insāñ ḳhaak kā putlā banā kyā chiiz hai
boltā hai is meñ kyā vo boltā kyā chiiz hai
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
gāliyāñ tanḳhvāh Thahrī hai agar baT jā.egī
āshiqoñ ke ghar miThā.ī lab shakar baT jā.egī
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
ga.ī yak-ba-yak jo havā palaT nahīñ dil ko mere qarār hai
karūñ us sitam ko maiñ kyā bayāñ mirā ġham se siina figār hai
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
hai dil ko jo yaad aa.ī falak-e-pīr kisī kī
āñkhoñ ke tale phirtī hai tasvīr kisī kī
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
ham ne tirī ḳhātir se dil-e-zār bhī chhoḌā
tū bhī na huā yaar aur ik yaar bhī chhoḌā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
ham ye to nahīñ kahte ki ġham kah nahīñ sakte
par jo sabab-e-ġhum hai vo ham kah nahīñ sakte
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
havā meñ phirte ho kyā hirs aur havā ke liye
ġhurūr chhoḌ do ai ġhāfilo ḳhudā ke liye
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
hijr ke haath se ab ḳhaak paḌe jiine meñ
dard ik aur uThā aah nayā siine meñ
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
hote hote chashm se aaj ashk-bārī rah ga.ī
aabrū baare tirī abr-e-bahārī rah ga.ī
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
ishq to mushkil hai ai dil kaun kahtā sahl hai
lek nādānī se apnī tū ne samjhā sahl hai
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
itnā na apne jaame se bāhar nikal ke chal
duniyā hai chal-chalāv kā rasta sambhal ke chal
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
jab kabhī dariyā meñ hote saya-afgan aap haiñ
fils-e-māhī ko batāte māh-e-raushan aap haiñ
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
jab ki pahlū meñ hamāre but-e-ḳhud-kām na ho
girye se shām-o-sahar kyuuñ ki hameñ kaam na ho
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
jigar ke TukḌe hue jal ke dil kabāb huā
ye ishq jaan ko mere koī azaab huā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
kāfir tujhe allāh ne sūrat to parī dī
par haif tire dil meñ mohabbat na zarī dī
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
kareñge qasd ham jis dam tumhāre ghar meñ āveñge
jo hogī umr bhar kī raah to dam bhar meñ āveñge
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
ḳhvāh kar insāf zālim ḳhvāh kar bedād tū
par jo fariyādī haiñ un kī sun to le fariyād tū
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
kyā kahūñ dil mā.il-e-zulf-e-dotā kyūñkar huā
ye bhalā chañgā giraftār-e-balā kyūñkar huā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
kyā kuchh na kiyā aur haiñ kyā kuchh nahīñ karte
kuchh karte haiñ aisā ba-ḳhudā kuchh nahīñ karte
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
kyūñkar na ḳhāksār raheñ ahl-e-kīñ se duur
dekho zamīñ falak se falak hai zamīñ se duur
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
kyūñki ham duniyā meñ aa.e kuchh sabab khultā nahīñ
ik sabab kyā bhed vaañ kā sab kā sab khultā nahīñ
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
lagtā nahīñ hai dil mirā ujḌe dayār meñ
kis kī banī hai ālam-e-nā-pā.edār meñ
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
maiñ huuñ aasī ki pur-ḳhatā kuchh huuñ
terā banda huuñ ai ḳhudā kuchh huuñ
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
mar ga.e ai vaah un kī nāz-bardārī meñ ham
dil ke hāthoñ se paḌe kaisī giraftārī meñ ham
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
mohabbat chāhiye bāham hameñ bhī ho tumheñ bhī ho
ḳhushī ho is meñ yā ho ġham hameñ bhī ho tumheñ bhī ho
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
na daa.im ġham hai ne ishrat kabhī yuuñ hai kabhī vuuñ hai
tabaddul yaañ hai har saa.at kabhī yuuñ hai kabhī vuuñ hai
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
na do dushnām ham ko itnī bad-ḳhūī se kyā hāsil
tumheñ denā hī hogā bosa ḳham-rūī se kyā hāsil
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
na durveshoñ kā ḳhirqa chāhiye na tāj-e-shāhānā
mujhe to hosh de itnā rahūñ maiñ tujh pe dīvānā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
na us kā bhed yaarī se na ayyārī se haath aayā
ḳhudā āgāh hai dil kī ḳhabardārī se haath aayā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
nahīñ ishq meñ is kā to ranj hameñ ki qarār o shakeb zarā na rahā
ġham-e-ishq to apnā rafīq rahā koī aur balā se rahā na rahā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
nibāh baat kā us hīla-gar se kuchh na huā
idhar se kyā na huā par udhar se kuchh na huā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
paan khā kar surma kī tahrīr phir khīñchī to kyā
jab mirā ḳhuuñ ho chukā shamshīr phir khīñchī to kyā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
qārūñ uThā ke sar pe sunā ganj le chalā
duniyā se kyā baḳhīl ba-juz rañj le chalā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
ruḳh jo zer-e-sumbul-e-pur-pech-o-tāb aa jā.egā
phir ke burj-e-sumbule meñ āftāb aa jā.egā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
sab rañg meñ us gul kī mire shaan hai maujūd
ġhāfil tū zarā dekh vo har aan hai maujūd
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
shāne kī har zabāñ se sune koī lāf-e-zulf
chīre hai siina raat ko ye mū-shigāf-e-zulf
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
shamshīr-e-barhana maañg ġhazab bāloñ kī mahak phir vaisī hī
juuḌe kī guñdhāvaT qahr-e-ḳhudā bāloñ kī mahak phir vaisī hī
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
tufta-jānoñ kā ilaaj ai ahl-e-dānish aur hai
ishq kī ātish balā hai us kī sozish aur hai
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
TukḌe nahīñ haiñ āñsuoñ meñ dil ke chaar pāñch
surḳhāb baiThe paanī meñ haiñ mil ke chaar pāñch
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
vaañ irāda aaj us qātil ke dil meñ aur hai
aur yahāñ kuchh aarzū bismil ke dil meñ aur hai
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
vaañ rasā.ī nahīñ to phir kyā hai
ye judā.ī nahīñ to phir kyā hai
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
vāqif haiñ ham ki hazrat-e-ġham aise shaḳhs haiñ
aur phir ham un ke yaar haiñ ham aise shaḳhs haiñ
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
vo sau sau aTkhaToñ se ghar se bāhar do qadam nikle
balā se us kī gar us meñ kisī muztar kā dam nikle
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
yā mujhe afsar-e-shāhāna banāyā hotā
yā mirā taaj gadāyāna banāyā hotā
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
yaañ ḳhaak kā bistar hai gale meñ kafnī hai
vaañ haath meñ ā.īna hai gul pairahanī hai
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
ye qissa vo nahīñ tum jis ko qissa-ḳhvāñ se suno
mire fasāna-e-ġham ko mirī zabāñ se suno
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
zulf jo ruḳh par tire ai mehr-e-tal.at khul ga.ī
ham ko apnī tīra-rozī kī haqīqat khul ga.ī
author: — bahadur shah zafar

text:
aap kā e'tibār kaun kare
roz kā intizār kaun kare
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
aarzū hai vafā kare koī
jī na chāhe to kyā kare koī
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
ab vo ye kah rahe haiñ mirī maan jā.iye
allāh terī shaan ke qurbān jā.iye
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
abhī hamārī mohabbat kisī ko kyā ma.alūm
kisī ke dil kī haqīqat kisī ko kyā ma.alūm
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
achchhī sūrat pe ġhazab TuuT ke aanā dil kā
yaad aatā hai hameñ haa.e zamānā dil kā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
ajab apnā haal hotā jo visāl-e-yār hotā
kabhī jaan sadqe hotī kabhī dil nisār hotā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
baaqī jahāñ meñ qais na farhād rah gayā
afsāna āshiqoñ kā faqat yaad rah gayā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
baat merī kabhī sunī hī nahīñ
jānte vo burī bhalī hī nahīñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
bhaveñ tantī haiñ ḳhanjar haath meñ hai tan ke baiThe haiñ
kisī se aaj bigḌī hai ki vo yuuñ ban ke baiThe haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
dekh kar joban tirā kis kis ko hairānī huī
is javānī par javānī aap dīvānī huī
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
dil churā kar nazar churā.ī hai
luT ga.e luT ga.e duhā.ī hai
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
dil-e-nākām ke haiñ kaam ḳharāb
kar liyā āshiqī meñ naam ḳharāb
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
dil gayā tum ne liyā ham kyā kareñ
jaane vaalī chiiz kā ġham kyā kareñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
dil ko kyā ho gayā ḳhudā jaane
kyuuñ hai aisā udaas kyā jaane
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
dil pareshān huā jaatā hai
aur sāmān huā jaatā hai
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
falak detā hai jin ko aish un ko ġham bhī hote haiñ
jahāñ bajte haiñ naqqāre vahīñ mātam bhī hote haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
ġhair ko muñh lagā ke dekh liyā
jhuuT sach aazmā ke dekh liyā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
ġham se kahīñ najāt mile chain paa.eñ ham
dil ḳhuun meñ nahā.e to gañgā nahā.eñ ham
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
ġhazab kiyā tire va.ade pe e'tibār kiyā
tamām raat qayāmat kā intizār kiyā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
idhar dekh lenā udhar dekh lenā
kan-añkhiyoñ se us ko magar dekh lenā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
in āñkhoñ ne kyā kyā tamāshā na dekhā
haqīqat meñ jo dekhnā thā na dekhā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
is adā se vo jafā karte haiñ
koī jaane ki vafā karte haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
is nahīñ kā koī ilaaj nahīñ
roz kahte haiñ aap aaj nahīñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
jalve mirī nigāh meñ kaun-o-makāñ ke haiñ
mujh se kahāñ chhupeñge vo aise kahāñ ke haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
jo ho saktā hai us se vo kisī se ho nahīñ saktā
magar dekho to phir kuchh aadmī se ho nahīñ saktā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
kaabe kī hai havas kabhī kū-e-butāñ kī hai
mujh ko ḳhabar nahīñ mirī miTTī kahāñ kī hai
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
kahte haiñ jis ko huur vo insāñ tumhīñ to ho
jaatī hai jis pe jaan mirī jaañ tumhīñ to ho
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
kaun sā tā.ir-e-gum-gashta use yaad aayā
dekhtā bhāltā har shāḳh ko sayyād aayā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
ḳhātir se yā lihāz se maiñ maan to gayā
jhūTī qasam se aap kā īmān to gayā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
le chalā jaan mirī ruuTh ke jaanā terā
aise aane se to behtar thā na aanā terā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
lutf vo ishq meñ paa.e haiñ ki jī jāntā hai
rañj bhī aise uThā.e haiñ ki jī jāntā hai
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
maze ishq ke kuchh vahī jānte haiñ
ki jo maut ko zindagī jānte haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
milāte ho usī ko ḳhaak meñ jo dil se miltā hai
mirī jaañ chāhne vaalā baḌī mushkil se miltā hai
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
nā-ravā kahiye nā-sazā kahiye
kahiye kahiye mujhe burā kahiye
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
phire raah se vo yahāñ aate aate
ajal mar rahī tū kahāñ aate aate
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
ranj kī jab guftugū hone lagī
aap se tum tum se tū hone lagī
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
saaf kab imtihān lete haiñ
vo to dam de ke jaan lete haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
saaz ye kīna-sāz kyā jāneñ
naaz vaale niyāz kyā jāneñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
sab log jidhar vo haiñ udhar dekh rahe haiñ
ham dekhne vāloñ kī nazar dekh rahe haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
sabaq aisā paḌhā diyā tū ne
dil se sab kuchh bhalā diyā tū ne
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
tamāshā-e-dair-o-haram dekhte haiñ
tujhe har bahāne se ham dekhte haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
terī sūrat ko dekhtā huuñ maiñ
us kī qudrat ko dekhtā huuñ maiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
tum ā.īna hī na har baar dekhte jaao
mirī taraf bhī to sarkār dekhte jaao
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
tumhāre ḳhat meñ nayā ik salām kis kā thā
na thā raqīb to āḳhir vo naam kis kā thā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
un ke ik jāñ-nisār ham bhī haiñ
haiñ jahāñ sau hazār ham bhī haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
uzr aane meñ bhī hai aur bulāte bhī nahīñ
bā.is-e-tark-e-mulāqāt batāte bhī nahīñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
uzr un kī zabān se niklā
tiir goyā kamān se niklā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
vo zamāna nazar nahīñ aatā
kuchh Thikānā nazar nahīñ aatā
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
ye baat baat meñ kyā nāzukī nikaltī hai
dabī dabī tire lab se hañsī nikaltī hai
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
zāhid na kah burī ki ye mastāne aadmī haiñ
tujh ko lipaT paḌeñge dīvāne aadmī haiñ
author: — dagh dehlvi

text:
chār-sū hai baḌī vahshat kā samāñ
kisī aaseb kā saaya hai yahāñ
author: — fahmida riaz

text:
jo mujh meñ chhupā merā galā ghoñT rahā hai
yā vo koī iblīs hai yā merā ḳhudā hai
author: — fahmida riaz

text:
kabhī dhanak sī utartī thī un nigāhoñ meñ
vo shoḳh rañg bhī dhīme paḌe havāoñ meñ
author: — fahmida riaz

text:
patthar se visāl māñgtī huuñ
maiñ ādamiyoñ se kaT ga.ī huuñ
author: — fahmida riaz

text:
ye kis ke āñsuoñ ne us naqsh ko miTāyā
jo mere lauh-e-dil par tū ne kabhī banāyā
author: — fahmida riaz

text:
ye pairahan jo mirī ruuh kā utar na sakā
to naḳh-ba-naḳh kahīñ paivast resha-e-dil thā
author: — fahmida riaz

text:
aa.e kuchh abr kuchh sharāb aa.e
is ke ba.ad aa.e jo azaab aa.e
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
aaj yuuñ mauj-dar-mauj ġham tham gayā is tarah ġham-zadoñ ko qarār aa gayā
jaise ḳhush-bū-e-zulf-e-bahār aa ga.ī jaise paiġhām-e-dīdār-e-yār aa gayā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
''aap kī yaad aatī rahī raat bhar''
chāñdnī dil dukhātī rahī raat bhar
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ab jo koī pūchhe bhī to us se kyā sharh-e-hālāt kareñ
dil Thahre to dard sunā.eñ dard thame to baat kareñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ab ke baras dastūr-e-sitam meñ kyā kyā baab īzād hue
jo qātil the maqtūl hue jo said the ab sayyād hue
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ab vahī harf-e-junūñ sab kī zabāñ Thahrī hai
jo bhī chal niklī hai vo baat kahāñ Thahrī hai
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
baat bas se nikal chalī hai
dil kī hālat sambhal chalī hai
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
chāñd nikle kisī jānib tirī zebā.ī kā
rañg badle kisī sūrat shab-e-tanhā.ī kā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
chashm-e-maigūñ zarā idhar kar de
dast-e-qudrat ko be-asar kar de
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
darbār meñ ab satvat-e-shāhī kī alāmat
darbāñ kā asā hai ki musannif kā qalam hai
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
dil meñ ab yuuñ tire bhūle hue ġham aate haiñ
jaise bichhḌe hue kaabe meñ sanam aate haiñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
donoñ jahān terī mohabbat meñ haar ke
vo jā rahā hai koī shab-e-ġham guzār ke
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
garmī-e-shauq-e-nazārā kā asar to dekho
gul khile jaate haiñ vo sāya-e-tar to dekho
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
go sab ko baham sāġhar o baada to nahīñ thā
ye shahr udaas itnā ziyāda to nahīñ thā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
guloñ meñ rañg bhare bād-e-nau-bahār chale
chale bhī aao ki gulshan kā kārobār chale
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
hairāñ hai jabīñ aaj kidhar sajda ravā hai
sar par haiñ ḳhudāvand sar-e-arsh ḳhudā hai
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ham musāfir yūñhī masrūf-e-safar jā.eñge
be-nishāñ ho ga.e jab shahr to ghar jā.eñge
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ham ne sab sher meñ sañvāre the
ham se jitne suḳhan tumhāre the
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ham par tumhārī chaah kā ilzām hī to hai
dushnām to nahīñ hai ye ikrām hī to hai
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
hamīñ se apnī navā ham-kalām hotī rahī
ye teġh apne lahū meñ niyām hotī rahī
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
har haqīqat majāz ho jaa.e
kāfiroñ kī namāz ho jaa.e
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
himmat-e-iltijā nahīñ baaqī
zabt kā hausla nahīñ baaqī
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ishq minnat-e-kash-e-qarār nahīñ
husn majbūr-e-intizār nahīñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
kab tak dil kī ḳhair manā.eñ kab tak rah dikhlāoge
kab tak chain kī mohlat doge kab tak yaad na aaoge
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
kab Thahregā dard ai dil kab raat basar hogī
sunte the vo ā.eñge sunte the sahar hogī
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
kab yaad meñ terā saath nahīñ kab haat meñ terā haat nahīñ
sad-shukr ki apnī rātoñ meñ ab hijr kī koī raat nahīñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
kabhī kabhī yaad meñ ubharte haiñ naqsh-e-māzī miTe miTe se
vo āzmā.ish dil o nazar kī vo qurbateñ sī vo fāsle se
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
kuchh mohtasiboñ kī ḳhalvat meñ kuchh vaa.iz ke ghar jaatī hai
ham bāda-kashoñ ke hisse kī ab jaam meñ kam-tar jaatī hai
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
kuchh pahle in āñkhoñ aage kyā kyā na nazārā guzre thā
kyā raushan ho jaatī thī galī jab yaar hamārā guzre thā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
na ab raqīb na nāseh na ġham-gusār koī
tum āshnā the to thiiñ āshnā.iyāñ kyā kyā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
na gañvāo nāvak-e-nīm-kash dil-e-reza-reza gañvā diyā
jo bache haiñ sañg sameT lo tan-e-dāġh-dāġh luTā diyā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
nahīñ nigāh meñ manzil to justujū hī sahī
nahīñ visāl mayassar to aarzū hī sahī
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
nasīb āzmāne ke din aa rahe haiñ
qarīb un ke aane ke din aa rahe haiñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
phir harīf-e-bahār ho baiThe
jaane kis kis ko aaj ro baiThe
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
qarz-e-nigāh-e-yār adā kar chuke haiñ ham
sab kuchh nisār-e-rāh-e-vafā kar chuke haiñ ham
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
rāz-e-ulfat chhupā ke dekh liyā
dil bahut kuchh jalā ke dekh liyā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
rañg pairāhan kā ḳhushbū zulf lahrāne kā naam
mausam-e-gul hai tumhāre baam par aane kā naam
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
sab qatl ho ke tere muqābil se aa.e haiñ
ham log surḳh-rū haiñ ki manzil se aa.e haiñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
sabhī kuchh hai terā diyā huā sabhī rāhateñ sabhī kulfateñ
kabhī sohbateñ kabhī furqateñ kabhī dūriyāñ kabhī qurbateñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
shām-e-firāq ab na pūchh aa.ī aur aa ke Tal ga.ī
dil thā ki phir bahal gayā jaañ thī ki phir sambhal ga.ī
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
shaiḳh sāhab se rasm-o-rāh na kī
shukr hai zindagī tabāh na kī
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
tire ġham ko jaañ kī talāsh thī tire jāñ-nisār chale ga.e
tirī rah meñ karte the sar talab sar-e-rahguzār chale ga.e
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
tirī umiid tirā intizār jab se hai
na shab ko din se shikāyat na din ko shab se hai
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
tum aa.e ho na shab-e-intizār guzrī hai
talāsh meñ hai sahar baar baar guzrī hai
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
tumhārī yaad ke jab zaḳhm bharne lagte haiñ
kisī bahāne tumheñ yaad karne lagte haiñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
vafā-e-vāda nahīñ vāda-e-digar bhī nahīñ
vo mujh se rūThe to the lekin is qadar bhī nahīñ
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
vo butoñ ne Daale haiñ vasvase ki diloñ se ḳhauf-e-ḳhudā gayā
vo paḌī haiñ roz qayāmateñ ki ḳhayāl-e-roz-e-jazā gayā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ye jafā-e-ġham kā chāra vo najāt-e-dil kā aalam
tirā husn dast-e-īsā tirī yaad rū-e-maryam
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
ye kis ḳhalish ne phir is dil meñ āshiyāna kiyā
phir aaj kis ne suḳhan ham se ġhā.ebāna kiyā
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
yuuñ sajā chāñd ki jhalkā tire andāz kā rañg
yuuñ fazā mahkī ki badlā mire hamrāz kā rañg
author: — faiz ahmad faiz

text:
aa.ī hai kuchh na pūchh qayāmat kahāñ kahāñ
uf le ga.ī hai mujh ko mohabbat kahāñ kahāñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
aaj bhī qāfila-e-ishq ravāñ hai ki jo thā
vahī miil aur vahī sañg-e-nishāñ hai ki jo thā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
āñkhoñ meñ jo baat ho ga.ī hai
ik sharh-e-hayāt ho ga.ī hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
ab aksar chup chup se raheñ haiñ yūñhī kabhū lab kholeñ haiñ
pahle 'firāq' ko dekhā hotā ab to bahut kam boleñ haiñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
ab daur-e-āsmāñ hai na daur-e-hayāt hai
ai dard-e-hijr tū hī batā kitnī raat hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
apne ġham kā mujhe kahāñ ġham hai
ai ki terī ḳhushī muqaddam hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
bahseñ chhiḌī huī haiñ hayāt-o-mamāt kī
sau baat ban ga.ī hai 'firāq' ek baat kī
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
bahut pahle se un qadmoñ kī aahaT jaan lete haiñ
tujhe ai zindagī ham duur se pahchān lete haiñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
bastiyāñ DhūñDh rahī haiñ unheñ vīrānoñ meñ
vahshateñ baḌh ga.iiñ had se tire dīvānoñ meñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
be-Thikāne hai dil-e-ġham-ghīñ Thikāne kī kaho
shām-e-hijrāñ dosto kuchh is ke aane kī kaho
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
chhalak ke kam na ho aisī koī sharāb nahīñ
nigāh-e-nargis-e-ra.anā tirā javāb nahīñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
chheḌ ai dil ye kisī shoḳh ke ruḳhsāroñ se
khelnā aah dahakte hue añgāroñ se
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
daur-e-āġhāz-e-jafā dil kā sahārā niklā
hausla kuchh na hamārā na tumhārā niklā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
dete haiñ jām-e-shahādat mujhe ma.alūm na thā
hai ye ā.īn-e-mohabbat mujhe ma.alūm na thā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
dīdār meñ ik turfa dīdār nazar aayā
har baar chhupā koī har baar nazar aayā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
'firāq' ik na.ī sūrat nikal to saktī hai
ba-qaul us aañkh ke duniyā badal to saktī hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
ġham tirā jalva-gah-e-kaun-o-makāñ hai ki jo thā
ya.anī insān vahī sho.ala-ba-jāñ hai ki jo thā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
haath aa.e to vahī dāman-e-jānāñ ho jaa.e
chhūT jaa.e to vahī apnā garebāñ ho jaa.e
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
har naala tire dard se ab aur hī kuchh hai
har naġhma sar-e-bazm-e-tarab aur hī kuchh hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
hijr-o-visāl-e-yār kā parda uThā diyā
ḳhud baḌh ke ishq ne mujhe merā patā diyā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
ik roz hue the kuchh ishārāt ḳhafī se
āshiq haiñ ham us nargis-e-rānā ke jabhī se
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
jahān-e-ġhuncha-e-dil kā faqat chaTaknā thā
usī kī bū-e-pareshāñ vajūd-e-duniyā thā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
jaur-o-be-mehrī-e-iġhmāz pe kyā rotā hai
mehrbāñ bhī koī ho jā.egā jaldī kyā hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
junūn-e-kārgar hai aur maiñ huuñ
hayāt-e-be-ḳhabar hai aur maiñ huuñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
kamī na kī tire vahshī ne ḳhaak uḌāne meñ
junūñ kā naam uchhaltā rahā zamāne meñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
kisī kā yuuñ to huā kaun umr bhar phir bhī
ye husn o ishq to dhokā hai sab magar phir bhī
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
koī paiġhām-e-mohabbat lab-e-ejāz to de
maut kī aañkh bhī khul jā.egī āvāz to de
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
kuchh ishāre the jinheñ duniyā samajh baiThe the ham
us nigāh-e-āshnā ko kyā samajh baiThe the ham
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
kuchh na kuchh ishq kī tāsīr kā iqrār to hai
us kā ilzām-e-taġhāful pe kuchh inkār to hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
mai-kade meñ aaj ik duniyā ko izn-e-ām thā
daur-e-jām-e-be-ḳhudī begāna-e-ayyām thā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
mujh ko maarā hai har ik dard o davā se pahle
dī sazā ishq ne har jurm-o-ḳhatā se pahle
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
narm fazā kī karvaTeñ dil ko dukhā ke rah ga.iiñ
ThanDī havā.eñ bhī tirī yaad dilā ke rah ga.iiñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
nigāh-e-nāz ne parde uThā.e haiñ kyā kyā
hijāb ahl-e-mohabbat ko aa.e haiñ kyā kyā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
raat bhī niiñd bhī kahānī bhī
haa.e kyā chiiz hai javānī bhī
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
ras meñ Duubā huā lahrātā badan kyā kahnā
karvaTeñ letī huī sub.h-e-chaman kyā kahnā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
rukī rukī sī shab-e-marg ḳhatm par aa.ī
vo pau phaTī vo na.ī zindagī nazar aa.ī
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
samajhtā huuñ ki tū mujh se judā hai
shab-e-furqat mujhe kyā ho gayā hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
sar meñ saudā bhī nahīñ dil meñ tamannā bhī nahīñ
lekin is tark-e-mohabbat kā bharosā bhī nahīñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
shām-e-ġham kuchh us nigāh-e-nāz kī bāteñ karo
be-ḳhudī baḌhtī chalī hai raaz kī bāteñ karo
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
sitāroñ se ulajhtā jā rahā huuñ
shab-e-furqat bahut ghabrā rahā huuñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
tez ehsās-e-ḳhudī darkār hai
zindagī ko zindagī darkār hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
tumheñ kyūñkar batā.eñ zindagī ko kyā samajhte haiñ
samajh lo saañs lenā ḳhud-kushī karnā samajhte haiñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
tuur thā ka.aba thā dil thā jalva-zār-e-yār thā
ishq sab kuchh thā magar phir ālam-e-asrār thā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
vaqt-e-ġhurūb aaj karāmāt ho ga.ī
zulfoñ ko us ne khol diyā raat ho ga.ī
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
vo chup-chāp aañsū bahāne kī rāteñ
vo ik shaḳhs ke yaad aane kī rāteñ
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
ye narm narm havā jhilmilā rahe haiñ charāġh
tire ḳhayāl kī ḳhushbū se bas rahe haiñ dimāġh
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
ye nik.hatoñ kī narm-ravī ye havā ye raat
yaad aa rahe haiñ ishq ko TuuTe ta.alluqāt
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
zamīñ badlī falak badlā mazāq-e-zindagī badlā
tamaddun ke qadīm aqdār badle aadmī badlā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
zer-o-bam se sāz-e-ḳhilqat ke jahāñ bantā gayā
ye zamīñ bantī ga.ī ye āsmāñ bantā gayā
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
zindagī dard kī kahānī hai
chashm-e-anjum meñ bhī to paanī hai
author: — firaq gorakhpuri

text:
āñkhoñ meñ jal rahā hai pa bujhtā nahīñ dhuāñ
uThtā to hai ghaTā sā barastā nahīñ dhuāñ
author: — gulzar

text:
aisā ḳhāmosh to manzar na fanā kā hotā
merī tasvīr bhī girtī to chhanākā hotā
author: — gulzar

text:
be-sabab muskurā rahā hai chāñd
koī sāzish chhupā rahā hai chāñd
author: — gulzar

text:
biite rishte talāsh kartī hai
ḳhushbū ġhunche talāsh kartī hai
author: — gulzar

text:
dard halkā hai saañs bhārī hai
jiye jaane kī rasm jaarī hai
author: — gulzar

text:
dikhā.ī dete haiñ dhuñd meñ jaise saa.e koī
magar bulāne se vaqt lauTe na aa.e koī
author: — gulzar

text:
din kuchh aise guzārtā hai koī
jaise ehsāñ utārtā hai koī
author: — gulzar

text:
ek parvāz dikhā.ī dī hai
terī āvāz sunā.ī dī hai
author: — gulzar

text:
garm lāsheñ girīñ fasīloñ se
āsmāñ bhar gayā hai chīloñ se
author: — gulzar

text:
guloñ ko sunñā zarā tum sadā.eñ bhejī haiñ
guloñ ke haath bahut sī duā.eñ bhejī haiñ
author: — gulzar

text:
haath chhūTeñ bhī to rishte nahīñ chhoḌā karte
vaqt kī shāḳh se lamhe nahīñ toḌā karte
author: — gulzar

text:
ham to kitnoñ ko mah-jabīñ kahte
aap haiñ is liye nahīñ kahte
author: — gulzar

text:
har ek ġham nichoḌ ke har ik baras jiye
do din kī zindagī meñ hazāroñ baras jiye
author: — gulzar

text:
havā ke siiñg na pakḌo khadeḌ detī hai
zamīñ se peḌoñ ke Tāñke udheḌ detī hai
author: — gulzar

text:
jab bhī āñkhoñ meñ ashk bhar aa.e
log kuchh Dūbte nazar aa.e
author: — gulzar

text:
jab bhī ye dil udaas hotā hai
jaane kaun ās-pās hotā hai
author: — gulzar

text:
kāñch ke pīchhe chāñd bhī thā aur kāñch ke uupar kaa.ī bhī
tīnoñ the ham vo bhī the aur maiñ bhī thā tanhā.ī bhī
author: — gulzar

text:
kahīñ to gard uḌe yā kahīñ ġhubār dikhe
kahīñ se aatā huā koī shahsavār dikhe
author: — gulzar

text:
khulī kitāb ke safhe ulaTte rahte haiñ
havā chale na chale din palaTte rahte haiñ
author: — gulzar

text:
ḳhushbū jaise log mile afsāne meñ
ek purānā ḳhat kholā anjāne meñ
author: — gulzar

text:
koī aTkā huā hai pal shāyad
vaqt meñ paḌ gayā hai bal shāyad
author: — gulzar

text:
koī ḳhāmosh zaḳhm lagtī hai
zindagī ek nazm lagtī hai
author: — gulzar

text:
mujhe añdhere meñ be-shak biThā diyā hotā
magar charāġh kī sūrat jalā diyā hotā
author: — gulzar

text:
os paḌī thī raat bahut aur kohra thā garmā.ish par
sailī sī ḳhāmoshī meñ āvāz sunī farmā.ish par
author: — gulzar

text:
peḌ ke pattoñ meñ halchal hai ḳhabar-dār se haiñ
shaam se tez havā chalne ke āsār se haiñ
author: — gulzar

text:
phuul ne Tahnī se uḌne kī koshish kī
ik taa.ir kā dil rakhne kī koshish kī
author: — gulzar

text:
phūloñ kī tarah lab khol kabhī
ḳhushbū kī zabāñ meñ bol kabhī
author: — gulzar

text:
ruke ruke se qadam ruk ke baar baar chale
qarār de ke tire dar se be-qarār chale
author: — gulzar

text:
sabr har baar iḳhtiyār kiyā
ham se hotā nahīñ hazār kiyā
author: — gulzar

text:
sahmā sahmā Darā sā rahtā hai
jaane kyuuñ jī bharā sā rahtā hai
author: — gulzar

text:
shaam se aaj saañs bhārī hai
be-qarārī sī be-qarārī hai
author: — gulzar

text:
shaam se aañkh meñ namī sī hai
aaj phir aap kī kamī sī hai
author: — gulzar

text:
tinkā tinkā kāñTe toḌe saarī raat kaTā.ī kī
kyuuñ itnī lambī hotī hai chāñdnī raat judā.ī kī
author: — gulzar

text:
tujh ko dekhā hai jo dariyā ne idhar aate hue
kuchh bhañvar Duub ga.e paanī meñ chakrāte hue
author: — gulzar

text:
vo ḳhat ke purze uḌā rahā thā
havāoñ kā ruḳh dikhā rahā thā
author: — gulzar

text:
zikr aa.e to mire lab se duā.eñ nikleñ
sham.a jaltī hai to lāzim hai shuā.eñ nikleñ
author: — gulzar

text:
zikr hotā hai jahāñ bhī mire afsāne kā
ek darvāza sā khultā hai kutub-ḳhāne kā
author: — gulzar

text:
zindagī yuuñ huī basar tanhā
qāfila saath aur safar tanhā
author: — gulzar

text:
aag hai phailī huī kaalī ghaTāoñ kī jagah
bad-duā.eñ haiñ laboñ par ab duāoñ kī jagah
author: — habib jalib

text:
ab terī zarūrat bhī bahut kam hai mirī jaañ
ab shauq kā kuchh aur hī aalam hai mirī jaañ
author: — habib jalib

text:
afsos tumheñ car ke shīshe kā huā hai
parvā nahīñ ik maañ kā jo dil TuuT gayā hai
author: — habib jalib

text:
apnoñ ne vo rañj diye haiñ begāne yaad aate haiñ
dekh ke us bastī kī hālat vīrāne yaad aate haiñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
aur sab bhuul ga.e harf-e-sadāqat likhnā
rah gayā kaam hamārā hī baġhāvat likhnā
author: — habib jalib

text:
bāteñ to kuchh aisī haiñ ki ḳhud se bhī na kī jaa.eñ
sochā hai ḳhamoshī se har ik zahr ko pī jaa.eñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
baḌe bane the 'jālib' sāhab piTe saḌak ke biich
golī khaa.ī lāThī khaa.ī gire saḌak ke biich
author: — habib jalib

text:
bahut raushan hai shām-e-ġham hamārī
kisī kī yaad hai hamdam hamārī
author: — habib jalib

text:
baTe rahoge to apnā yūñhī bahegā lahū
hue na ek to manzil na ban sakegā lahū
author: — habib jalib

text:
bhulā bhī de use jo baat ho ga.ī pyāre
na.e charāġh jalā raat ho ga.ī pyāre
author: — habib jalib

text:
chuur thā zaḳhmoñ se dil zaḳhmī jigar bhī ho gayā
us ko rote the ki suunā ye nagar bhī ho gayā
author: — habib jalib

text:
daraḳht suukh ga.e ruk ga.e nadī naale
ye kis nagar ko ravāna hue haiñ ghar vaale
author: — habib jalib

text:
dil-e-pur-shauq ko pahlū meñ dabā.e rakkhā
tujh se bhī ham ne tirā pyaar chhupā.e rakkhā
author: — habib jalib

text:
dil kī baat laboñ par lā kar ab tak ham dukh sahte haiñ
ham ne sunā thā is bastī meñ dil vaale bhī rahte haiñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
dil par jo zaḳhm haiñ vo dikhā.eñ kisī ko kyā
apnā sharīk-e-dard banā.eñ kisī ko kyā
author: — habib jalib

text:
dil vaalo kyuuñ dil sī daulat yuuñ be-kār luTāte ho
kyuuñ is añdhiyārī bastī meñ pyaar kī jot jagāte ho
author: — habib jalib

text:
dushmanoñ ne jo dushmanī kī hai
dostoñ ne bhī kyā kamī kī hai
author: — habib jalib

text:
'faiz' aur 'faiz' kā ġham bhūlne vaalā hai kahīñ
maut ye terā sitam bhūlne vaalā hai kahīñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
ham ne dil se tujhe sadā maanā
tū baḌā thā tujhe baḌā maanā
author: — habib jalib

text:
hujūm dekh ke rasta nahīñ badalte ham
kisī ke Dar se taqāzā nahīñ badalte ham
author: — habib jalib

text:
ik shaḳhs bā-zamīr mirā yaar 'mus.hafī'
merī tarah vafā kā parastār 'mus.hafī'
author: — habib jalib

text:
is shahr-e-ḳharābī meñ ġham-e-ishq ke maare
zinda haiñ yahī baat baḌī baat hai pyāre
author: — habib jalib

text:
jāgne vaalo tā-ba-sahar ḳhāmosh raho
kal kyā hogā kis ko ḳhabar ḳhāmosh raho
author: — habib jalib

text:
jhūTī ḳhabreñ ghaḌne vaale jhūTe sher sunāne vaale
logo sabr ki apne kiye kī jald sazā haiñ paane vaale
author: — habib jalib

text:
jīvan mujh se maiñ jīvan se sharmātā huuñ
mujh se aage jaane vaalo meñ aatā huuñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
kabhī to mehrbāñ ho kar bulā leñ
ye mahvash ham faqīroñ kī duā leñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
kahīñ aah ban ke lab par tirā naam aa na jaa.e
tujhe bevafā kahūñ maiñ vo maqām aa na jaa.e
author: — habib jalib

text:
kam purānā bahut nayā thā firāq
ik ajab ramz-āshnā thā firāq
author: — habib jalib

text:
kaun batā.e kaun sujhā.e kaun se des sidhār ga.e
un kā rasta takte takte nain hamāre haar ga.e
author: — habib jalib

text:
ḳhuub āzādī-e-sahāfat hai
nazm likhne pe bhī qayāmat hai
author: — habib jalib

text:
kuchh log ḳhayāloñ se chale jaa.eñ to so.eñ
biite hue din raat na yaad aa.eñ to so.eñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
log gītoñ kā nagar yaad aayā
aaj pardes meñ ghar yaad aayā
author: — habib jalib

text:
'mīr'-o-'ġhālib' bane 'yagānā' bane
aadmī ai ḳhudā ḳhudā na bane
author: — habib jalib

text:
na Dagmagā.e kabhī ham vafā ke raste meñ
charāġh ham ne jalā.e havā ke raste meñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
phir dil se aa rahī hai sadā us galī meñ chal
shāyad mile ġhazal kā patā us galī meñ chal
author: — habib jalib

text:
phir kabhī lauT kar na ā.eñge
ham tirā shahr chhoḌ jā.eñge
author: — habib jalib

text:
sher hotā hai ab mahīnoñ meñ
zindagī Dhal ga.ī mashīnoñ meñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
sher se shā.irī se Darte haiñ
kam-nazar raushnī se Darte haiñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
tire māthe pe jab tak bal rahā hai
ujālā aañkh se ojhal rahā hai
author: — habib jalib

text:
tum se pahle vo jo ik shaḳhs yahāñ taḳht-nashīñ thā
us ko bhī apne ḳhudā hone pe itnā hī yaqīñ thā
author: — habib jalib

text:
us ne jab hañs ke namaskār kiyā
mujh ko insān se autār kiyā
author: — habib jalib

text:
us ra.ūnat se vo jiite haiñ ki marnā hī nahīñ
taḳht par baiThe haiñ yuuñ jaise utarnā hī nahīñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
vahī hālāt haiñ faqīroñ ke
din phire haiñ faqat vazīroñ ke
author: — habib jalib

text:
vatan ko kuchh nahīñ ḳhatra nizām-e-zar hai ḳhatre meñ
haqīqat meñ jo rahzan hai vahī rahbar hai ḳhatre meñ
author: — habib jalib

text:
vo dekhne mujhe aanā to chāhtā hogā
magar zamāne kī bātoñ se Dar gayā hogā
author: — habib jalib

text:
ye aur baat terī galī meñ na aa.eñ ham
lekin ye kyā ki shahr tirā chhoḌ jaa.eñ ham
author: — habib jalib

text:
ye jo shab ke aivānoñ meñ ik halchal ik hashr bapā hai
ye jo añdherā simaT rahā hai ye jo ujālā phail rahā hai
author: — habib jalib

text:
ye soch kar na mā.il-e-fariyād ham hue
ābād kab hue the ki barbād ham hue
author: — habib jalib

text:
yuuñ vo zulmat se rahā dast-o-garebāñ yaaro
us se larzāñ the bahut shab ke nigahbāñ yaaro
author: — habib jalib

text:
zarre hī sahī koh se Takrā to ga.e ham
dil le ke sar-e-arsa-e-ġham aa to ga.e ham
author: — habib jalib

text:
aa.e kyā kyā yaad nazar jab paḌtī in dālānoñ par
us kā kāġhaz chipkā denā ghar ke raushan-dānoñ par
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
aahaT sī koī aa.e to lagtā hai ki tum ho
saaya koī lahrā.e to lagtā hai ki tum ho
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
aaj muddat meñ vo yaad aa.e haiñ
dar o dīvār pe kuchh saa.e haiñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
āñkheñ churā ke ham se bahār aa.e ye nahīñ
hisse meñ apne sirf ġhubār aa.e ye nahīñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
achchhā hai un se koī taqāzā kiyā na jaa.e
apnī nazar meñ aap ko rusvā kiyā na jaa.e
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
ai dard-e-ishq tujh se mukarne lagā huuñ maiñ
mujh ko sambhāl had se guzarne lagā huuñ maiñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
ash.ār mire yuuñ to zamāne ke liye haiñ
kuchh sher faqat un ko sunāne ke liye haiñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
bahut dil kar ke hoñToñ kī shagufta tāzgī dī hai
chaman māñgā thā par us ne ba-mushkil ik kalī dī hai
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
chauñk chauñk uThtī hai mahloñ kī fazā raat ga.e
kaun detā hai ye galiyoñ meñ sadā raat ga.e
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
diida o dil meñ koī husn bikhartā hī rahā
laakh pardoñ meñ chhupā koī sañvartā hī rahā
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
dil ko har lamha bachāte rahe jazbāt se ham
itne majbūr rahe haiñ kabhī hālāt se ham
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
ham ne kaaTī haiñ tirī yaad meñ rāteñ aksar
dil se guzrī haiñ sitāroñ kī barāteñ aksar
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
ham se bhāgā na karo duur ġhazāloñ kī tarah
ham ne chāhā hai tumheñ chāhne vāloñ kī tarah
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
har ek ruuh meñ ik ġham chhupā lage hai mujhe
ye zindagī to koī bad-duā lage hai mujhe
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
har ek shaḳhs pareshān-o-darba-dar sā lage
ye shahr mujh ko to yaaro koī bhañvar sā lage
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
hausla kho na diyā terī nahīñ se ham ne
kitnī shiknoñ ko chunā terī jabīñ se ham ne
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
jab lageñ zaḳhm to qātil ko duā dī jaa.e
hai yahī rasm to ye rasm uThā dī jaa.e
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
jism kī har baat hai āvārgī ye mat kaho
ham bhī kar sakte haiñ aisī shā.erī ye mat kaho
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
ḳhud-ba-ḳhud mai hai ki shīshe meñ bharī aave hai
kis balā kī tumheñ jādū-nazarī aave hai
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
laakh āvāra sahī shahroñ ke fuTpāthoñ pe ham
laash ye kis kī liye phirte haiñ in hāthoñ pe ham
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
log kahte haiñ ki tū ab bhī ḳhafā hai mujh se
terī āñkhoñ ne to kuchh aur kahā hai mujh se
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
maanā ki rañg rañg tirā pairahan bhī hai
par is meñ kuchh karishma-e-aks-e-badan bhī hai
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
mai-kashī ab mirī aadat ke sivā kuchh bhī nahīñ
ye bhī ik talḳh haqīqat ke sivā kuchh bhī nahīñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
mauj-e-gul mauj-e-sabā mauj-e-sahar lagtī hai
sar se pā tak vo samāñ hai ki nazar lagtī hai
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
muddat huī us jān-e-hayā ne ham se ye iqrār kiyā
jitne bhī badnām hue ham utnā us ne pyaar kiyā
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
mujhe ma.alūm hai maiñ saarī duniyā kī amānat huuñ
magar vo lamha jab maiñ sirf apnā ho sā jaatā huuñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
ranj-o-ġham māñge hai andoh-o-balā māñge hai
dil vo mujrim hai ki ḳhud apnī sazā māñge hai
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
sau chāñd bhī chamkeñge to kyā baat banegī
tum aa.e to is raat kī auqāt banegī
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
sub.h ke dard ko rātoñ kī jalan ko bhūleñ
kis ke ghar jaa.eñ ki is va.ada-shikan ko bhūleñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
tamām umr azāboñ kā silsila to rahā
ye kam nahīñ hameñ jiine kā hausla to rahā
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
tulū-e-sub.h hai nazreñ uThā ke dekh zarā
shikast-e-zulmat-e-shab muskurā ke dekh zarā
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
tum pe kyā biit ga.ī kuchh to batāo yaaro
maiñ koī ġhair nahīñ huuñ ki chhupāo yaaro
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
tumhāre jashn ko jashn-e-farozāñ ham nahīñ kahte
lahū kī garm būñdoñ ko charāġhāñ ham nahīñ kahte
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
tū is qadar mujhe apne qarīb lagtā hai
tujhe alag se jo sochūñ ajiib lagtā hai
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
ufuq agarche pighaltā dikhā.ī paḌtā hai
mujhe to duur saverā dikhā.ī paḌtā hai
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
vo ham se aaj bhī dāman-kashāñ chale hai miyāñ
kisī pe zor hamārā kahāñ chale hai miyāñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
vo log hī har daur meñ mahbūb rahe haiñ
jo ishq meñ tālib nahīñ matlūb rahe haiñ
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
zamīñ hogī kisī qātil kā dāmāñ ham na kahte the
akārat jā.egā ḳhūn-e-shahīdāñ ham na kahte the
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
zarā sī baat pe har rasm toḌ aayā thā
dil-e-tabāh ne bhī kyā mizāj paayā thā
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
zindagī tujh ko bhulāyā hai bahut din ham ne
vaqt ḳhvāboñ meñ gañvāyā hai bahut din ham ne
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
zindagī ye to nahīñ tujh ko sañvārā hī na ho
kuchh na kuchh ham ne tirā qarz utārā hī na ho
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
zulfeñ siina naaf kamar
ek nadī meñ kitne bhañvar
author: — jaan nisar akhtar

text:
aadmī vaqt par gayā hogā
vaqt pahle guzar gayā hogā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
aaj lab-e-guhar-fishāñ aap ne vā nahīñ kiyā
tazkira-e-ḳhajista-e-āb-o-havā nahīñ kiyā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
āḳhirī baar aah kar lī hai
maiñ ne ḳhud se nibāh kar lī hai
author: — jaun eliya

text:
aap apnā ġhubār the ham to
yaad the yādgār the ham to
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ab kisī se mirā hisāb nahīñ
merī āñkhoñ meñ koī ḳhvāb nahīñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ab vo ghar ik vīrāna thā bas vīrāna zinda thā
sab āñkheñ dam toḌ chukī thiiñ aur maiñ tanhā zinda thā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
abhī farmān aayā hai vahāñ se
ki haT jā.ūñ maiñ apne darmiyāñ se
author: — jaun eliya

text:
abhī ik shor sā uThā hai kahīñ
koī ḳhāmosh ho gayā hai kahīñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ai subah maiñ ab kahāñ rahā huuñ
ḳhvāboñ hī meñ sarf ho chukā huuñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
aish-e-ummīd hī se ḳhatra hai
dil ko ab dil-dahī se ḳhatra hai
author: — jaun eliya

text:
apnā ḳhāka lagtā huuñ
ek tamāshā lagtā huuñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
apne sab yaar kaam kar rahe haiñ
aur ham haiñ ki naam kar rahe haiñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
baḌā ehsān ham farmā rahe haiñ
ki un ke ḳhat unheñ lauTā rahe haiñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
bahut dil ko kushāda kar liyā kyā
zamāne bhar se va.ada kar liyā kyā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
be-dilī kyā yūñhī din guzar jā.eñge
sirf zinda rahe ham to mar jā.eñge
author: — jaun eliya

text:
be-qarārī sī be-qarārī hai
vasl hai aur firāq taarī hai
author: — jaun eliya

text:
chalo bād-e-bahārī jā rahī hai
piyā-jī kī savārī jā rahī hai
author: — jaun eliya

text:
dil jo hai aag lagā duuñ us ko
aur phir ḳhud hī havā duuñ us ko
author: — jaun eliya

text:
dil kī taklīf kam nahīñ karte
ab koī shikva ham nahīñ karte
author: — jaun eliya

text:
dil ne vafā ke naam par kār-e-vafā nahīñ kiyā
ḳhud ko halāk kar liyā ḳhud ko fidā nahīñ kiyā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ek hī muzhda sub.h laatī hai
dhuup āñgan meñ phail jaatī hai
author: — jaun eliya

text:
gaahe gaahe bas ab yahī ho kyā
tum se mil kar bahut ḳhushī ho kyā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ghar se ham ghar talak ga.e hoñge
apne hī aap tak ga.e hoñge
author: — jaun eliya

text:
hālat-e-hāl ke sabab hālat-e-hāl hī ga.ī
shauq meñ kuchh nahīñ gayā shauq kī zindagī ga.ī
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ham jī rahe haiñ koī bahāna kiye baġhair
us ke baġhair us kī tamannā kiye baġhair
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ham to jaise vahāñ ke the hī nahīñ
be-amāñ the amaañ ke the hī nahīñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
har dhaḌkan haijānī thī har ḳhāmoshī tūfānī thī
phir bhī mohabbat sirf musalsal milne kī āsānī thī
author: — jaun eliya

text:
īzā-dahī kī daad jo paatā rahā huuñ maiñ
har nāz-āfrīñ ko satātā rahā huuñ maiñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ik hunar hai jo kar gayā huuñ maiñ
sab ke dil se utar gayā huuñ maiñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
jī hī jī meñ vo jal rahī hogī
chāñdnī meñ Tahal rahī hogī
author: — jaun eliya

text:
jo huā 'jaun' vo huā bhī nahīñ
ya.anī jo kuchh bhī thā vo thā bhī nahīñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
juz gumāñ aur thā hī kyā merā
faqat ik merā naam thā merā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
kaam kī baat maiñ ne kī hī nahīñ
ye mirā taur-e-zindagī hī nahīñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ḳhuub hai shauq kā ye pahlū bhī
maiñ bhī barbād ho gayā tū bhī
author: — jaun eliya

text:
kis se iz.hār-e-mudda.ā kiije
aap milte nahīñ haiñ kyā kiije
author: — jaun eliya

text:
kitne aish se rahte hoñge kitne itrāte hoñge
jaane kaise log vo hoñge jo us ko bhāte hoñge
author: — jaun eliya

text:
nayā ik rishta paidā kyuuñ kareñ ham
bichhaḌnā hai to jhagḌā kyuuñ kareñ ham
author: — jaun eliya

text:
ruuh pyāsī kahāñ se aatī hai
ye udāsī kahāñ se aatī hai
author: — jaun eliya

text:
saare rishte tabāh kar aayā
dil-e-barbād apne ghar aayā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
sar hī ab phoḌiye nadāmat meñ
niiñd aane lagī hai furqat meñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
sharmindagī hai ham ko bahut ham mile tumheñ
tum sar-ba-sar ḳhushī the magar ġham mile tumheñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
siina dahak rahā ho to kyā chup rahe koī
kyuuñ chīḳh chīḳh kar na galā chhīl le koī
author: — jaun eliya

text:
tañg āġhosh meñ ābād karūñgā tujh ko
huuñ bahut shaad ki nāshād karūñgā tujh ko
author: — jaun eliya

text:
Thiik hai ḳhud ko ham badalte haiñ
shukriya mashvarat kā chalte haiñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
tumhārā hijr manā luuñ agar ijāzat ho
maiñ dil kisī se lagā luuñ agar ijāzat ho
author: — jaun eliya

text:
tū bhī chup hai maiñ bhī chup huuñ ye kaisī tanhā.ī hai
tere saath tirī yaad aa.ī kyā tū sach-much aa.ī hai
author: — jaun eliya

text:
umr guzregī imtihān meñ kyā
daaġh hī deñge mujh ko daan meñ kyā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
us ke pahlū se lag ke chalte haiñ
ham kahīñ Tālne se Talte haiñ
author: — jaun eliya

text:
zabt kar ke hañsī ko bhuul gayā
maiñ to us zaḳhm hī ko bhuul gayā
author: — jaun eliya

text:
zindagī kyā hai ik kahānī hai
ye kahānī nahīñ sunānī hai
author: — jaun eliya

text:
aaj maiñ ne apnā phir saudā kiyā
aur phir maiñ duur se dekhā kiyā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
abhī zamīr meñ thoḌī sī jaan baaqī hai
abhī hamārā koī imtihān baaqī hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
ba-zāhir kyā hai jo hāsil nahīñ hai
magar ye to mirī manzil nahīñ hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
bahāna DhūñDte rahte haiñ koī rone kā
hameñ ye shauq hai kyā āstīñ bhigone kā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
dard apnātā hai parā.e kaun
kaun suntā hai aur sunā.e kaun
author: — javed akhtar

text:
dard ke phuul bhī khilte haiñ bikhar jaate haiñ
zaḳhm kaise bhī hoñ kuchh roz meñ bhar jaate haiñ
author: — javed akhtar

text:
dard kuchh din to mehmāñ Thahre
ham ba-zid haiñ ki mezbāñ Thahre
author: — javed akhtar

text:
dast-bardār agar aap ġhazab se ho jaa.eñ
har sitam bhuul ke ham aap ke ab se ho jaa.eñ
author: — javed akhtar

text:
dil kā har dard kho gayā jaise
maiñ to patthar kā ho gayā jaise
author: — javed akhtar

text:
dil meñ mahak rahe haiñ kisī aarzū ke phuul
palkoñ pe khilne vaale haiñ shāyad lahū ke phuul
author: — javed akhtar

text:
dukh ke jañgal meñ phirte haiñ kab se maare maare log
jo hotā hai sah lete haiñ kaise haiñ bechāre log
author: — javed akhtar

text:
ġham hote haiñ jahāñ zehānat hotī hai
duniyā meñ har shai kī qīmat hotī hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
ham ne DhūñDeñ bhī to DhūñDeñ haiñ sahāre kaise
in sarāboñ pe koī umr guzāre kaise
author: — javed akhtar

text:
ham to bachpan meñ bhī akele the
sirf dil kī galī meñ khele the
author: — javed akhtar

text:
hamāre dil meñ ab talḳhī nahīñ hai
magar vo baat pahle sī nahīñ hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
hamāre shauq kī ye intihā thī
qadam rakkhā ki manzil rāstā thī
author: — javed akhtar

text:
jab ā.īna koī dekho ik ajnabī dekho
kahāñ pe laa.ī hai tum ko ye zindagī dekho
author: — javed akhtar

text:
jidhar jaate haiñ sab jaanā udhar achchhā nahīñ lagtā
mujhe pāmāl rastoñ kā safar achchhā nahīñ lagtā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
jiinā mushkil hai ki āsān zarā dekh to lo
log lagte haiñ pareshān zarā dekh to lo
author: — javed akhtar

text:
jism damaktā, zulf ghanerī, rañgīñ lab, āñkheñ jaadū
sañg-e-marmar, uudā bādal, surḳh shafaq, hairāñ aahū
author: — javed akhtar

text:
kabhī kabhī maiñ ye sochtā huuñ ki mujh ko terī talāsh kyuuñ hai
ki jab haiñ saare hī taar TuuTe to saaz meñ irti.āsh kyuuñ hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
kal jahāñ dīvār thī hai aaj ik dar dekhiye
kyā samā.ī thī bhalā dīvāne ke sar dekhiye
author: — javed akhtar

text:
khulā hai dar pa tirā intizār jaatā rahā
ḳhulūs to hai magar e'tibār jaatā rahā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
ḳhvāb ke gaañv meñ pale haiñ ham
paanī chhalnī meñ le chale haiñ ham
author: — javed akhtar

text:
kin lafzoñ meñ itnī kaḌvī itnī kasīlī baat likhūñ
sher kī maiñ tahzīb banā huuñ yā apne hālāt likhūñ
author: — javed akhtar

text:
kis liye kiije bazm-ārā.ī
pur-sukūñ ho ga.ī hai tanhā.ī
author: — javed akhtar

text:
maiñ kab se kitnā huuñ tanhā tujhe patā bhī nahīñ
tirā to koī ḳhudā hai mirā ḳhudā bhī nahīñ
author: — javed akhtar

text:
maiñ ḳhud bhī sochtā huuñ ye kyā merā haal hai
jis kā javāb chāhiye vo kyā savāl hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
maiñ pā sakā na kabhī is ḳhalish se chhuTkārā
vo mujh se jiit bhī saktā thā jaane kyuuñ haarā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
mere dil meñ utar gayā sūraj
tīrgī meñ nikhar gayā sūraj
author: — javed akhtar

text:
misāl is kī kahāñ hai koī zamāne meñ
ki saare khone ke ġham paa.e ham ne paane meñ
author: — javed akhtar

text:
mujh ko yaqīñ hai sach kahtī thiiñ jo bhī ammī kahtī thiiñ
jab mere bachpan ke din the chāñd meñ pariyāñ rahtī thiiñ
author: — javed akhtar

text:
na ḳhushī de to kuchh dilāsa de
dost jaise ho mujh ko bahlā de
author: — javed akhtar

text:
nigal ga.e sab kī sab samundar zamīñ bachī ab kahīñ nahīñ hai
bachāte ham apnī jaan jis meñ vo kashtī bhī ab kahīñ nahīñ hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
phirte haiñ kab se dar-ba-dar ab is nagar ab us nagar ik dūsre ke ham-safar maiñ aur mirī āvārgī
nā-āshnā har rah-guzar nā-mehrbāñ har ik nazar jaa.eñ to ab jaa.eñ kidhar maiñ aur mirī āvārgī
author: — javed akhtar

text:
pyaas kī kaise laa.e taab koī
nahīñ dariyā to ho sarāb koī
author: — javed akhtar

text:
saarī hairat hai mirī saarī adā us kī hai
be-gunāhī hai mirī aur sazā us kī hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
sach ye hai be-kār hameñ ġham hotā hai
jo chāhā thā duniyā meñ kam hotā hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
shahr ke dukāñ-dāro kārobār-e-ulfat meñ suud kyā ziyāñ kyā hai tum na jaan pāoge
dil ke daam kitne haiñ ḳhvāb kitne mahñge haiñ aur naqd-e-jāñ kyā hai tum na jaan pāoge
author: — javed akhtar

text:
shukr hai ḳhairiyat se huuñ sāhab
aap se aur kyā kahūñ sāhab
author: — javed akhtar

text:
sūkhī Tahnī tanhā chiḌiyā phīkā chāñd
āñkhoñ ke sahrā meñ ek namī kā chāñd
author: — javed akhtar

text:
vo Dhal rahā hai to ye bhī rañgat badal rahī hai
zamīn sūraj kī uñgliyoñ se phisal rahī hai
author: — javed akhtar

text:
vo zamāna guzar gayā kab kā
thā jo dīvāna mar gayā kab kā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
yaad use bhī ek adhūrā afsāna to hogā
kal raste meñ us ne ham ko pahchānā to hogā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
yahī hālāt ibtidā se rahe
log ham se ḳhafā ḳhafā se rahe
author: — javed akhtar

text:
yaqīn kā agar koī bhī silsila nahīñ rahā
to shukr kījiye ki ab koī gilā nahīñ rahā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
ye duniyā tum ko raas aa.e to kahnā
na sar patthar se Takrā.e to kahnā
author: — javed akhtar

text:
ye mujh se pūchhte haiñ chāragar kyuuñ
ki tū zinda to hai ab tak magar kyuuñ
author: — javed akhtar

text:
ye tasallī hai ki haiñ nāshād sab
maiñ akelā hī nahīñ barbād sab
author: — javed akhtar

text:
zarā mausam to badlā hai magar peḌoñ kī shāḳhoñ par na.e pattoñ ke aane meñ abhī kuchh din lageñge
bahut se zard chehroñ par ġhubār-e-ġham hai kam be-shak par un ko muskurāne meñ abhī kuchh din lageñge
author: — javed akhtar

text:
aadmī aadmī se miltā hai
dil magar kam kisī se miltā hai
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
aaj kyā haal hai yārab sar-e-mahfil merā
ki nikāle liye jaatā hai koī dil merā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
āñkhoñ kā thā qusūr na dil kā qusūr thā
aayā jo mere sāmne merā ġhurūr thā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
āñkhoñ meñ bas ke dil meñ samā kar chale ga.e
ḳhvābīda zindagī thī jagā kar chale ga.e
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
aayā na raas nāla-e-dil kā asar mujhe
ab tum mile to kuchh nahīñ apnī ḳhabar mujhe
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ab to ye bhī nahīñ rahā ehsās
dard hotā hai yā nahīñ hotā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
agar na zohra-jabīnoñ ke darmiyāñ guzre
to phir ye kaise kaTe zindagī kahāñ guzre
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ai husn-e-yār sharm ye kyā inqalāb hai
tujh se ziyāda dard tirā kāmyāb hai
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
allāh agar taufīq na de insān ke bas kā kaam nahīñ
faizān-e-mohabbat aam sahī irfān-e-mohabbat aam nahīñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
barābar se bach kar guzar jaane vaale
ye naale nahīñ be-asar jaane vaale
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
be-kaif dil hai aur jiye jā rahā huuñ maiñ
ḳhālī hai shīsha aur piye jā rahā huuñ maiñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
dāstān-e-ġham-e-dil un ko sunā.ī na ga.ī
baat bigḌī thī kuchh aisī ki banā.ī na ga.ī
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
dil gayā raunaq-e-hayāt ga.ī
ġham gayā saarī kā.enāt ga.ī
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
dil ko sukūn ruuh ko ārām aa gayā
maut aa ga.ī ki dost kā paiġhām aa gayā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
dil meñ kisī ke raah kiye jā rahā huuñ maiñ
kitnā hasīñ gunāh kiye jā rahā huuñ maiñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
duniyā ke sitam yaad na apnī hī vafā yaad
ab mujh ko nahīñ kuchh bhī mohabbat ke sivā yaad
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
fikr-e-manzil hai na hosh-e-jāda-e-manzil mujhe
jā rahā huuñ jis taraf le jā rahā hai dil mujhe
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ham ko miTā sake ye zamāne meñ dam nahīñ
ham se zamāna ḳhud hai zamāne se ham nahīñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ik lafz-e-mohabbat kā adnā ye fasānā hai
simTe to dil-e-āshiq phaile to zamānā hai
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ishq-e-lā-mahdūd jab tak rahnumā hotā nahīñ
zindagī se zindagī kā haq adā hotā nahīñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ishq ko be-naqāb honā thā
aap apnā javāb honā thā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ishq meñ lā-javāb haiñ ham log
māhtāb āftāb haiñ ham log
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
jehl-e-ḳhirad ne din ye dikhā.e
ghaT ga.e insāñ baḌh ga.e saa.e
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
jo ab bhī na taklīf farmā.iyegā
to bas haath malte hī rah jā.iyegā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
jo tūfānoñ meñ palte jā rahe haiñ
vahī duniyā badalte jā rahe haiñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
kaam āḳhir jazba-e-be-iḳhtiyār aa hī gayā
dil kuchh is sūrat se taḌpā un ko pyaar aa hī gayā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
kabhī shāḳh o sabza o barg par kabhī ġhuncha o gul o ḳhaar par
maiñ chaman meñ chāhe jahāñ rahūñ mirā haq hai fasl-e-bahār par
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
kasrat meñ bhī vahdat kā tamāshā nazar aayā
jis rañg meñ dekhā tujhe yaktā nazar aayā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
kiyā ta.ajjub ki mirī rūh-e-ravāñ tak pahuñche
pahle koī mire naġhmoñ kī zabāñ tak pahuñche
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
koī ye kah de gulshan gulshan
laakh balā.eñ ek nasheman
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
kuchh is adā se aaj vo pahlū-nashīñ rahe
jab tak hamāre paas rahe ham nahīñ rahe
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
kyā barābar kā mohabbat meñ asar hotā hai
dil idhar hotā hai zālim na udhar hotā hai
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
lākhoñ meñ intiḳhāb ke qābil banā diyā
jis dil ko tum ne dekh liyā dil banā diyā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
mohabbat meñ ye kyā maqām aa rahe haiñ
ki manzil pe haiñ aur chale jā rahe haiñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
nazar milā ke mire paas aa ke luuT liyā
nazar haTī thī ki phir muskurā ke luuT liyā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
sab pe tū mehrbān hai pyāre
kuchh hamārā bhī dhyān hai pyāre
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
sabhī andāz-e-husn pyāre haiñ
ham magar sādgī ke maare haiñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
shā.er-e-fitrat huuñ jab bhī fikr farmātā huuñ maiñ
ruuh ban kar zarre zarre meñ samā jaatā huuñ maiñ
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
shab-e-firāq hai aur niind aa.ī jaatī hai
kuchh is meñ un kī tavajjoh bhī paa.ī jaatī hai
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
sharmā ga.e lajā ga.e dāman chhuḌā ga.e
ai ishq marhabā vo yahāñ tak to aa ga.e
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
tabī.at in dinoñ begāna-e-ġham hotī jaatī hai
mire hisse kī goyā har ḳhushī kam hotī jaatī hai
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
tire jamāl-e-haqīqat kī taab hī na huī
hazār baar nigah kī magar kabhī na huī
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
tujhī se ibtidā hai tū hī ik din intihā hogā
sadā-e-sāz hogī aur na sāz-e-be-sadā hogā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
us kī nazroñ meñ intiḳhāb huā
dil ajab husn se ḳharāb huā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
use hāl-o-qāl se vāsta na ġharaz maqām-o-qayām se
jise koī nisbat-e-ḳhās ho tire husn-e-barq-ḳhirām se
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
vo adā-e-dilbarī ho ki navā-e-āshiqāna
jo diloñ ko fat.h kar le vahī fāteh-e-zamāna
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
vo jo rūTheñ yuuñ manānā chāhiye
zindagī se ruuTh jaanā chāhiye
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
yādash-ba-ḳhair jab vo tasavvur meñ aa gayā
sher o shabāb o husn kā dariyā bahā gayā
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ye hai mai-kada yahāñ riñd haiñ yahāñ sab kā saaqī imaam hai
ye haram nahīñ hai ai shaiḳh jī yahāñ pārsā.ī harām hai
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
ye misra.a kaash naqsh-e-har-dar-o-dīvār ho jaa.e
jise jiinā ho marne ke liye tayyār ho jaa.e
author: — jigar moradabadi

text:
aaj sochā to aañsū bhar aa.e
muddateñ ho ga.iiñ muskurā.e
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
haath aa kar lagā gayā koī
merā chhappar uThā gayā koī
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
itnā to zindagī meñ kisī ke ḳhalal paḌe
hañsne se ho sukūn na rone se kal paḌe
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
jhukī jhukī sī nazar be-qarār hai ki nahīñ
dabā dabā sā sahī dil meñ pyaar hai ki nahīñ
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
jo vo mire na rahe maiñ bhī kab kisī kā rahā
bichhaḌ ke un se salīqa na zindagī kā rahā
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
kahīñ se lauT ke ham laḌkhaḌā.e haiñ kyā kyā
sitāre zer-e-qadam raat aa.e haiñ kyā kyā
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
ḳhār-o-ḳhas to uTheñ rāsta to chale
maiñ agar thak gayā qāfila to chale
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
kī hai koī hasīn ḳhatā har ḳhatā ke saath
thoḌā sā pyaar bhī mujhe de do sazā ke saath
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
kyā jaane kis kī pyaas bujhāne kidhar ga.iiñ
is sar pe jhuum ke jo ghaTā.eñ guzar ga.iiñ
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
laa.ī phir ik laġhzish-e-mastāna tere shahr meñ
phir baneñgī masjideñ mai-ḳhāna tere shahr meñ
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
maiñ DhūñDtā huuñ jise vo jahāñ nahīñ miltā
na.ī zamīn nayā āsmāñ nahīñ miltā
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
patthar ke ḳhudā vahāñ bhī paa.e
ham chāñd se aaj lauT aa.e
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
shor yūñhī na parindoñ ne machāyā hogā
koī jañgal kī taraf shahr se aayā hogā
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
sunā karo mirī jaañ in se un se afsāne
sab ajnabī haiñ yahāñ kaun kis ko pahchāne
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
tum itnā jo muskurā rahe ho
kyā ġham hai jis ko chhupā rahe ho
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
vo bhī sarāhne lage arbāb-e-fan ke ba.ad
dād-e-suḳhan milī mujhe tark-e-suḳhan ke ba.ad
author: — kaifi azmi

text:
ibtidā se ham za.iif o nā-tavāñ paidā hue
uḌ gayā jab rañg ruḳh se ustuḳhvāñ paidā hue
author: — meer anees

text:
ishāre kyā nigah-e-nāz-e-dil-rubā ke chale
sitam ke tiir chale nīmche qazā ke chale
author: — meer anees

text:
ḳhud naved-e-zindagī laa.ī qazā mere liye
sham-e-kushta huuñ fanā meñ hai baqā mere liye
author: — meer anees

text:
koī aniis koī āshnā nahīñ rakhte
kisī kī aas baġhair az ḳhudā nahīñ rakhte
author: — meer anees

text:
mirā rāz-e-dil āshkārā nahīñ
vo dariyā huuñ jis kā kinārā nahīñ
author: — meer anees

text:
numūd o buud ko aaqil habāb samjhe haiñ
vo jāgte haiñ jo duniyā ko ḳhvāb samjhe haiñ
author: — meer anees

text:
sadā hai fikr-e-taraqqī buland-bīnoñ ko
ham āsmān se laa.e haiñ in zamīnoñ ko
author: — meer anees

text:
shahīd-e-ishq hue qais nāmvar kī tarah
jahāñ meñ aib bhī ham ne kiye hunar kī tarah
author: — meer anees

text:
vajd ho bulbul-e-tasvīr ko jis kī bū se
us se gul-rañg kā da.avā kare phir kis rū se
author: — meer anees

text:
aa jaa.eñ ham nazar jo koī dam bahut hai yaañ
mohlat hameñ bisān-e-sharar kam bahut hai yaañ
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
aa.e haiñ 'mīr' kāfir ho kar ḳhudā ke ghar meñ
peshānī par hai qashqa zunnār hai kamar meñ
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
aah jis vaqt sar uThātī hai
arsh par barchhiyāñ chalātī hai
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
aam hukm-e-sharāb kartā huuñ
mohtasib ko kabāb kartā huuñ
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
aao kabhū to paas hamāre bhī naaz se
karnā sulūk ḳhuub hai ahl-e-niyāz se
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ārzūeñ hazār rakhte haiñ
to bhī ham dil ko maar rakhte haiñ
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ab jo ik hasrat-e-javānī hai
umr-e-rafta kī ye nishānī hai
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ashk āñkhoñ meñ kab nahīñ aatā
lohū aatā hai jab nahīñ aatā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ba-rañg-e-bū-e-gul us baaġh ke ham āshnā hote
ki hamrāh-e-sabā Tuk sair karte phir havā hote
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
bār-hā gor-e-dil jhañkā laayā
ab ke shart-e-vafā bajā laayā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
baare duniyā meñ raho ġham-zada yā shaad raho
aisā kuchh kar ke chalo yaañ ki bahut yaad raho
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
bāteñ hamārī yaad raheñ phir bāteñ aisī na suniyegā
paḌhte kisū ko suniyegā to der talak sar dhuniyegā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
banī thī kuchh ik us se muddat ke baad
so phir bigḌī pahlī hī sohbat ke baad
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
chalte ho to chaman ko chaliye kahte haiñ ki bahārāñ hai
paat hare haiñ phuul khile haiñ kam-kam bād-o-bārāñ hai
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
chaman meñ gul ne jo kal dāva-e-jamāl kiyā
jamāl-e-yār ne muñh us kā ḳhuub laal kiyā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
dekh to dil ki jaañ se uThtā hai
ye dhuāñ sā kahāñ se uThtā hai
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
faqīrāna aa.e sadā kar chale
