ki myaañ ḳhush raho ham duā kar chale
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ġham rahā jab tak ki dam meñ dam rahā
dil ke jaane kā nihāyat ġham rahā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ham aap hī ko apnā maqsūd jānte haiñ
apne sivā.e kis ko maujūd jānte haiñ
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
hamāre aage tirā jab kisū ne naam liyā
dil-e-sitam-zada ko ham ne thaam thaam liyā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
hastī apnī habāb kī sī hai
ye numā.ish sarāb kī sī hai
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
is ahd meñ ilāhī mohabbat ko kyā huā
chhoḌā vafā ko un ne muravvat ko kyā huā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ishq hamāre ḳhayāl paḌā hai ḳhvāb ga.ī ārām gayā
jī kā jaanā Thahar rahā hai sub.h gayā yā shaam gayā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ishq meñ zillat huī ḳhiffat huī tohmat huī
āḳhir āḳhir jaan dī yāroñ ne ye sohbat huī
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
jab naam tirā lījiye tab chashm bhar aave
is zindagī karne ko kahāñ se jigar aave
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
jab rone baiThtā huuñ tab kyā kasar rahe hai
rūmāl do do din tak juuñ abr tar rahe hai
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
jīte-jī kūcha-e-dildār se jaayā na gayā
us kī dīvār kā sar se mire saaya na gayā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
jin jin ko thā ye ishq kā āzār mar ga.e
aksar hamāre saath ke bīmār mar ga.e
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
jin ke liye apne to yuuñ jaan nikalte haiñ
is raah meñ ve jaise anjān nikalte haiñ
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
jis sar ko ġhurūr aaj hai yaañ tāj-varī kā
kal us pe yahīñ shor hai phir nauhagarī kā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
jo is shor se 'mīr' rotā rahegā
to ham-sāya kaahe ko sotā rahegā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
kuchh mauj-e-havā pechāñ ai 'mīr' nazar aa.ī
shāyad ki bahār aa.ī zanjīr nazar aa.ī
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
kyā haqīqat kahūñ ki kyā hai ishq
haq-shanāsoñ ke haañ ḳhudā hai ishq
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
kyā kahūñ tum se maiñ ki kyā hai ishq
jaan kā rog hai balā hai ishq
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
lazzat se nahīñ ḳhālī jānoñ kā khapā jaanā
kab ḳhizr o masīhā ne marne kā maza jaanā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ham hue tum hue ki 'mīr' hue
us kī zulfoñ ke sab asiir hue
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
rāh-e-dūr-e-ishq meñ rotā hai kyā
aage aage dekhiye hotā hai kyā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
aage jamāl-e-yār ke ma.azūr ho gayā
gul ik chaman meñ dīda-e-be-nūr ho gayā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
āh-e-sahar ne sozish-e-dil ko miTā diyā
us baav ne hameñ to diyā sā bujhā diyā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
aa.e haiñ 'mīr' muñh ko banā.e ḳhafā se aaj
shāyad bigaḌ ga.ī hai kuchh us bevafā se aaj
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
āvegī merī qabr se āvāz mere ba.ad
ubhreñge ishq-e-dil se tire raaz mere ba.ad
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
muñh takā hī kare hai jis tis kā
hairatī hai ye ā.īna kis kā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
pattā pattā buuTā buuTā haal hamārā jaane hai
jaane na jaane gul hī na jaane baaġh to saarā jaane hai
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
sher ke parde meñ maiñ ne ġham sunāyā hai bahut
marsiye ne dil ke mere bhī rulāyā hai bahut
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
thā musta.ār husn se us ke jo nuur thā
ḳhurshīd meñ bhī us hī kā zarra zuhūr thā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
ulTī ho ga.iiñ sab tadbīreñ kuchh na davā ne kaam kiyā
dekhā is bīmāri-e-dil ne āḳhir kaam tamām kiyā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
umr bhar ham rahe sharābī se
dil-e-pur-ḳhūñ kī ik gulābī se
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
us kā ḳhayāl chashm se shab ḳhvāb le gayā
qasme ki ishq jī se mire taab le gayā
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
yaaro mujhe muaaf rakho maiñ nashe meñ huuñ
ab do to jaam ḳhālī hī do maiñ nashe meñ huuñ
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
zaḳhm jhele daaġh bhī khaa.e bahut
dil lagā kar ham to pachhtā.e bahut
author: — meer taqi meer

text:
aa ki mirī jaan ko qarār nahīñ hai
tāqat-e-bedād-e-intizār nahīñ hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
aabrū kyā ḳhaak us gul kī ki gulshan meñ nahīñ
hai garebāñ nañg-e-pairāhan jo dāman meñ nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
aah ko chāhiye ik umr asar hote tak
kaun jiitā hai tirī zulf ke sar hote tak
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ā.īna dekh apnā sā muñh le ke rah ga.e
sāhab ko dil na dene pe kitnā ġhurūr thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ā.īna kyuuñ na duuñ ki tamāshā kaheñ jise
aisā kahāñ se lā.ūñ ki tujh sā kaheñ jise
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
āmad-e-ḳhat se huā hai sard jo bāzār-e-dost
dūd-e-sham-e-kushta thā shāyad ḳhat-e-ruḳhsār-e-dost
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
āmad-e-sailāb-e-tūfān-e-sadā-e-āb hai
naqsh-e-pā jo kaan meñ rakhtā hai uñglī jaada se
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
afsos ki dandāñ kā kiyā rizq falak ne
jin logoñ kī thī dar-ḳhur-e-aqd-e-guhar añgusht
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ajab nashāt se jallād ke chale haiñ ham aage
ki apne saa.e se sar paañv se hai do qadam aage
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
arz-e-nāz-e-shoḳhi-e-dandāñ barā.e-ḳhanda hai
dāvā-e-jamiyat-e-ahbāb jā-e-ḳhanda hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
arz-e-niyāz-e-ishq ke qābil nahīñ rahā
jis dil pe naaz thā mujhe vo dil nahīñ rahā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
'asad' ham vo junūñ-jaulāñ gadā-e-be-sar-o-pā haiñ
ki hai sar-panja-e-mizhgān-e-āhū pusht-ḳhār apnā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
az-mehr tā-ba-zarra dil-o-dil hai aa.ina
tuutī ko shash-jihat se muqābil hai aa.ina
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ba-nāla hāsil-e-dil-bastagī farāham kar
matā-e-ḳhāna-e-zanjīr juz sadā ma.alūm
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
baaġh pā kar ḳhafaqānī ye Darātā hai mujhe
sāya-e-shāḳh-e-gul af.ī nazar aatā hai mujhe
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
bāzīcha-e-atfāl hai duniyā mire aage
hotā hai shab-o-roz tamāshā mire aage
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
bahut sahī ġham-e-gītī sharāb kam kyā hai
ġhulām-e-sāqī-e-kausar huuñ mujh ko ġham kyā hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
balā se haiñ jo ye pesh-e-nazar dar-o-dīvār
nigāh-e-shauq ko haiñ bāl-o-par dar-o-dīvār
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
barshikāl-e-girya-e-āshiq hai dekhā chāhiye
khil ga.ī mānind-e-gul sau jā se dīvār-e-chaman
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
bas-ki dushvār hai har kaam kā āsāñ honā
aadmī ko bhī mayassar nahīñ insāñ honā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
bazm-e-shāhanshāh meñ ash.ār kā daftar khulā
rakhiyo yā rab ye dar-e-ganjīna-e-gauhar khulā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
be-e'tidāliyoñ se subuk sab meñ ham hue
jitne ziyāda ho ga.e utne hī kam hue
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
bīm-e-raqīb se nahīñ karte vidā-e-hosh
majbūr yaañ talak hue ai iḳhtiyār haif
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
bisāt-e-ijz meñ thā ek dil yak qatra ḳhuuñ vo bhī
so rahtā hai ba-andāz-e-chakīdan sar-nigūñ vo bhī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
chāhiye achchhoñ ko jitnā chāhiye
ye agar chāheñ to phir kyā chāhiye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
chaak kī ḳhvāhish agar vahshat ba-uryānī kare
sub.h ke mānind zaḳhm-e-dil garebānī kare
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
chashm-e-ḳhūbāñ ḳhāmushī meñ bhī navā-pardāz hai
surma to kahve ki dūd-e-sho.ala-e-āvāz hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
daa.im paḌā huā tire dar par nahīñ huuñ maiñ
ḳhaak aisī zindagī pe ki patthar nahīñ huuñ maiñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dahr meñ naqsh-e-vafā vaj.h-e-tasallī na huā
hai ye vo lafz ki sharminda-e-ma.anī na huā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dar-ḳhur-e-qahr-o-ġhazab jab koī ham sā na huā
phir ġhalat kyā hai ki ham sā koī paidā na huā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dard minnat-kash-e-davā na huā
maiñ na achchhā huā burā na huā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dard se mere hai tujh ko be-qarārī haa.e haa.e
kyā huī zālim tirī ġhaflat-shi.ārī haa.e haa.e
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dekh kar dar-parda garm-e-dāman-afshānī mujhe
kar ga.ī vābasta-e-tan merī uryānī mujhe
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dekhnā qismat ki aap apne pe rashk aa jaa.e hai
maiñ use dekhūñ bhalā kab mujh se dekhā jaa.e hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dhamkī meñ mar gayā jo na bāb-e-nabard thā
ishq-e-nabard-pesha talabgār-e-mard thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dhotā huuñ jab maiñ piine ko us sīm-tan ke paañv
rakhtā hai zid se khīñch ke bāhar lagan ke paañv
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dīvāngī se dosh pe zunnār bhī nahīñ
ya.anī hamāre jeb meñ ik taar bhī nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dil-e-nādāñ tujhe huā kyā hai
āḳhir is dard kī davā kyā hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dil hī to hai na sañg-o-ḳhisht dard se bhar na aa.e kyuuñ
ro.eñge ham hazār baar koī hameñ satā.e kyuuñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dil lagā kar lag gayā un ko bhī tanhā baiThnā
baare apnī bekasī kī ham ne paa.ī daad yaañ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dil mirā soz-e-nihāñ se be-muhābā jal gayā
ātish-e-ḳhāmosh kī mānind goyā jal gayā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dil se tirī nigāh jigar tak utar ga.ī
donoñ ko ik adā meñ razā-mand kar ga.ī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
diyā hai dil agar us ko bashar hai kyā kahiye
huā raqīb to ho nāma-bar hai kyā kahiye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
donoñ jahān de ke vo samjhe ye ḳhush rahā
yaañ aa paḌī ye sharm ki takrār kyā kareñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
dost ġham-ḳhvārī meñ merī sa.ī farmāveñge kyā
zaḳhm ke bharte talak nāḳhun na baḌh jāveñge kyā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ek ek qatre kā mujhe denā paḌā hisāb
ḳhūn-e-jigar vadī.at-e-mizhgān-e-yār thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ek jā harf-e-vafā likkhā thā so bhī miT gayā
zāhiran kāġhaz tire ḳhat kā ġhalat-bar-dār hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
fāriġh mujhe na jaan ki mānind-e-sub.h-o-mehr
hai dāġh-e-ishq zīnat-e-jeb-e-kafan hunūz
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
fariyād kī koī lai nahīñ hai
naala pāband-e-nai nahīñ hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ġhāfil ba-vahm-e-nāz ḳhud-ārā hai varna yaañ
be-shāna-e-sabā nahīñ turra gayāh kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ga.ī vo baat ki ho guftugū to kyūñkar ho
kahe se kuchh na huā phir kaho to kyūñkar ho
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ġhair leñ mahfil meñ bose jaam ke
ham raheñ yuuñ tishna-lab paiġhām ke
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ġham-e-duniyā se gar paa.ī bhī fursat sar uThāne kī
falak kā dekhnā taqrīb tere yaad aane kī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ġham khāne meñ buudā dil-e-nākām bahut hai
ye rañj ki kam hai mai-e-gulfām bahut hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ġham nahīñ hotā hai āzādoñ ko besh az-yak-nafas
barq se karte haiñ raushan sham-e-mātam-ḳhāna ham
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
gar ḳhāmushī se fā.eda iḳhfā-e-hāl hai
ḳhush huuñ ki merī baat samajhnī muhāl hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
gar na andoh-e-shab-e-furqat bayāñ ho jā.egā
be-takalluf dāġh-e-mah mohr-e-dahāñ ho jā.egā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
gar tujh ko hai yaqīn-e-ijābat duā na maañg
ya.anī baġhair-e-yak-dil-e-be-mudda.ā na maañg
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
garm-e-fariyād rakhā shakl-e-nihālī ne mujhe
tab amaañ hijr meñ dī bard-e-layālī ne mujhe
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ghar hamārā jo na rote bhī to vīrāñ hotā
bahr gar bahr na hotā to bayābāñ hotā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ghar jab banā liyā tire dar par kahe baġhair
jānegā ab bhī tū na mirā ghar kahe baġhair
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ghar meñ thā kyā ki tirā ġham use ġhārat kartā
vo jo rakhte the ham ik hasrat-e-tāmīr so hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
gila hai shauq ko dil meñ bhī tañgi-e-jā kā
guhar meñ mahv huā iztirāb dariyā kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
gulshan ko tirī sohbat az-bas-ki ḳhush aa.ī hai
har ġhunche kā gul honā āġhosh-kushā.ī hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
gulshan meñ bandobast ba-rañg-e-digar hai aaj
qumrī kā tauq halqa-e-bairūn-e-dar hai aaj
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ġhuncha-e-nā-shagufta ko duur se mat dikhā ki yuuñ
bose ko pūchhtā huuñ maiñ muñh se mujhe batā ki yuuñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hāsil se haath dho baiTh ai ārzū-ḳhirāmī
dil josh-e-girya meñ hai Duubī huī asāmī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hai ārmīdagī meñ nikohish bajā mujhe
sub.h-e-vatan hai ḳhanda-e-dandāñ-numā mujhe
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hai bas-ki har ik un ke ishāre meñ nishāñ aur
karte haiñ mohabbat to guzartā hai gumāñ aur
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hai bazm-e-butāñ meñ suḳhan āzurda-laboñ se
tañg aa.e haiñ ham aise ḳhushāmad-talaboñ se
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hai kis qadar halāk-e-fareb-e-vafā-e-gul
bulbul ke kārobār pe haiñ ḳhanda-hā-e-gul
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hai sabza-zār har dar-o-dīvār-e-ġham-kada
jis kī bahār ye ho phir us kī ḳhizāñ na pūchh
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hai vasl hijr ālam-e-tamkīn-o-zabt meñ
māshūq-e-shoḳh o āshiq-e-dīvāna chāhiye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hairāñ huuñ dil ko ro.uuñ ki pīTūñ jigar ko maiñ
maqdūr ho to saath rakhūñ nauhagar ko maiñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ham par jafā se tark-e-vafā kā gumāñ nahīñ
ik chheḌ hai vagarna murād imtihāñ nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ham rashk ko apne bhī gavārā nahīñ karte
marte haiñ vale un kī tamannā nahīñ karte
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ham se khul jaao ba-vaqt-e-mai-parastī ek din
varna ham chheḌeñge rakh kar uzr-e-mastī ek din
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
har ek baat pe kahte ho tum ki tū kyā hai
tumhīñ kaho ki ye andāz-e-guftugū kyā hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
har qadam dūrī-e-manzil hai numāyāñ mujh se
merī raftār se bhāge hai bayābāñ mujh se
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
harīf-e-matlab-e-mushkil nahīñ fusūn-e-niyāz
duā qubūl ho yā rab ki umr-e-ḳhizr darāz
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hasad se dil agar afsurda hai garm-e-tamāshā ho
ki chashm-e-tañg shāyad kasrat-e-nazzāra se vā ho
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
havas ko hai nashāt-e-kār kyā kyā
na ho marnā to jiine kā mazā kyā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hazāroñ ḳhvāhisheñ aisī ki har ḳhvāhish pe dam nikle
bahut nikle mire armān lekin phir bhī kam nikle
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ho ga.ī hai ġhair kī shīrīñ-bayānī kārgar
ishq kā us ko gumāñ ham be-zabānoñ par nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
huī tāḳhīr to kuchh bā.is-e-tāḳhīr bhī thā
aap aate the magar koī ināñ-gīr bhī thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hujūm-e-ġham se yaañ tak sar-nigūnī mujh ko hāsil hai
ki tār-e-dāman o tār-e-nazar meñ farq mushkil hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
hujūm-e-nāla hairat ājiz-e-arz yak-afġhāñ hai
ḳhamoshī resha-e-sad-nīstāñ se ḳhas-ba-dandāñ hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
husn-e-be-parvā ḳharīdār-e-matā-e-jalva hai
aa.ina zānū-e-fikr-e-iḳhtirā-e-jalva hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
husn-e-mah garche ba-hañgām-e-kamāl achchhā hai
us se merā mah-e-ḳhurshīd-jamāl achchhā hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
husn ġhamze kī kashākash se chhuTā mere ba.ad
baare ārām se haiñ ahl-e-jafā mere ba.ad
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
huuñ maiñ bhī tamāshā.i-e-nairañg-e-tamannā
matlab nahīñ kuchh is se ki matlab hī bar aave
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
huzūr-e-shāh meñ ahl-e-suḳhan kī āzmā.ish hai
chaman meñ ḳhush-navāyan-e-chaman kī āzmā.ish hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ibn-e-mariyam huā kare koī
mere dukh kī davā kare koī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ishq mujh ko nahīñ vahshat hī sahī
merī vahshat tirī shohrat hī sahī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ishq tāsīr se naumed nahīñ
jāñ-sapārī shajar-e-bed nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ishrat-e-qatra hai dariyā meñ fanā ho jaanā
dard kā had se guzarnā hai davā ho jaanā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jāda-e-rah ḳhur ko vaqt-e-shām hai tār-e-shuā.a
charḳh vā kartā hai māh-e-nau se āġhosh-e-vidā.a
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jab ba-taqrīb-e-safar yaar ne mahmil bāñdhā
tapish-e-shauq ne har zarre pe ik dil bāñdhā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jab tak dahān-e-zaḳhm na paidā kare koī
mushkil ki tujh se rāh-e-suḳhan vā kare koī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jahāñ terā naqsh-e-qadam dekhte haiñ
ḳhayābāñ ḳhayābāñ iram dekhte haiñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jarāhat-tohfa almās-armuġhāñ dāġh-e-jigar hadiya
mubārakbād 'asad' ġham-ḳhvār-e-jān-e-dardmand aayā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jaur se baaz aa.e par baaz aa.eñ kyā
kahte haiñ ham tujh ko muñh dikhlā.eñ kyā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jis bazm meñ tū naaz se guftār meñ aave
jaañ kālbad-e-sūrat-e-dīvār meñ aave
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jis jā nasīm shānā-kash-e-zulf-e-yār hai
naafā dimāġh-e-āhu-e-dasht-e-tatār hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jis zaḳhm kī ho saktī ho tadbīr rafū kī
likh dījiyo yā rab use qismat meñ adū kī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
jo na naqd-e-dāġh-e-dil kī kare shola pāsbānī
to fasurdagī nihāñ hai ba-kamīn-e-be-zabānī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
junūñ kī dast-gīrī kis se ho gar ho na uryānī
garebāñ-chāk kā haq ho gayā hai merī gardan par
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
junūñ tohmat-kash-e-taskīñ na ho gar shādmānī kī
namak-pāsh-e-ḳharāsh-e-dil hai lazzat zindagānī kī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
juz qais aur koī na aayā ba-rū-e-kār
sahrā magar ba-tañgi-e-chashm-e-hasūd thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kaabe meñ jā rahā to na do ta.ana kyā kaheñ
bhūlā huuñ haqq-e-sohbat-e-ahl-e-kunisht ko
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kār-gāh-e-hastī meñ laala dāġh-sāmāñ hai
barq-e-ḳhirman-e-rāhat ḳhūn-e-garm-e-dahqāñ hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kab vo suntā hai kahānī merī
aur phir vo bhī zabānī merī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kabhī nekī bhī us ke jī meñ gar aa jaa.e hai mujh se
jafā.eñ kar ke apnī yaad sharmā jaa.e hai mujh se
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kahte ho na deñge ham dil agar paḌā paayā
dil kahāñ ki gum kiije ham ne mudda.ā paayā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kahte to ho tum sab ki but-e-ġhāliyā-mū aa.e
yak martaba ghabrā ke kaho koī ki vo aa.e
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kahūñ jo haal to kahte ho mudda.ā kahiye
tumhīñ kaho ki jo tum yuuñ kaho to kyā kahiye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kal ke liye kar aaj na ḳhissat sharāb meñ
ye sū-e-zan hai sāqi-e-kausar ke baab meñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kare hai baada tire lab se kasb-e-rañg-e-faroġh
ḳhat-e-piyāla sarāsar nigāh-e-gul-chīñ hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ḳhamoshiyoñ meñ tamāshā adā nikaltī hai
nigāh dil se tire surma-sā nikaltī hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ḳhatar hai rishta-e-ulfat rag-e-gardan na ho jaave
ġhurūr-e-dostī aafat hai tū dushman na ho jaave
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kī vafā ham se to ġhair is ko jafā kahte haiñ
hotī aa.ī hai ki achchhoñ ko burā kahte haiñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kisī ko de ke dil koī navā-sañj-e-fuġhāñ kyuuñ ho
na ho jab dil hī siine meñ to phir muñh meñ zabāñ kyuuñ ho
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
koh ke hoñ bār-e-ḳhātir gar sadā ho jā.iye
be-takalluf ai sharār-e-jasta kyā ho jā.iye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
koī din gar zindagānī aur hai
apne jī meñ ham ne Thānī aur hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
koī ummīd bar nahīñ aatī
koī sūrat nazar nahīñ aatī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kyā tañg ham sitam-zadagāñ kā jahān hai
jis meñ ki ek baiza-e-mor āsmān hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kyuuñ jal gayā na tāb-e-ruḳh-e-yār dekh kar
jaltā huuñ apnī tāqat-e-dīdār dekh kar
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kyuuñ na ho chashm-e-butāñ mahv-e-taġhāful kyuuñ na ho
ya.anī us bīmār ko nazzāre se parhez hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
kyūñkar us but se rakhūñ jaan aziiz
kyā nahīñ hai mujhe īmān aziiz
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
lāġhar itnā huuñ ki gar tū bazm meñ jā de mujhe
merā zimma dekh kar gar koī batlā de mujhe
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
lāzim thā ki dekho mirā rastā koī din aur
tanhā ga.e kyuuñ ab raho tanhā koī din aur
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
lab-e-īsā kī jumbish kartī hai gahvāra-jumbānī
qayāmat kushta-e-la.al-e-butāñ kā ḳhvāb-e-sañgīñ hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
lab-e-ḳhushk dar-tishnagī-murdagāñ kā
ziyārat-kada huuñ dil-āzurdagāñ kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
laraztā hai mirā dil zahmat-e-mehr-e-daraḳhshāñ par
maiñ huuñ vo qatra-e-shabnam ki ho ḳhār-e-bayābāñ par
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
latāfat be-kasāfat jalva paidā kar nahīñ saktī
chaman zañgār hai ā.īna-e-bād-e-bahārī kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
lo ham marīz-e-ishq ke bīmār-dār haiñ
achchhā agar na ho to masīhā kā kyā ilaaj
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
luuñ vaam baḳht-e-ḳhufta se yak-ḳhvāb-e-ḳhush vale
'ġhālib' ye ḳhauf hai ki kahāñ se adā karūñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
māna-e-dasht-navardī koī tadbīr nahīñ
ek chakkar hai mire paañv meñ zanjīr nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
mahram nahīñ hai tū hī navā-hā-e-rāz kā
yaañ varna jo hijāb hai parda hai saaz kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
maiñ aur bazm-e-mai se yuuñ tishna-kām aa.uuñ
gar maiñ ne kī thī tauba saaqī ko kyā huā thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
maiñ unheñ chheḌūñ aur kuchh na kaheñ
chal nikalte jo mai piye hote
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
manzūr thī ye shakl tajallī ko nuur kī
qismat khulī tire qad-o-ruḳh se zuhūr kī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
masjid ke zer-e-sāya ḳharābāt chāhiye
bhauñ paas aañkh qibla-e-hājāt chāhiye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
mastī ba-zauq-e-ġhaflat-e-sāqī halāk hai
mauj-e-sharāb yak-mizha-e-ḳhvāb-nāk hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
mat mardumak-e-dīda meñ samjho ye nigāheñ
haiñ jam.a suvaidā-e-dil-e-chashm meñ aaheñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
maze jahān ke apnī nazar meñ ḳhaak nahīñ
sivā.e ḳhūn-e-jigar so jigar meñ ḳhaak nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
mehrbāñ ho ke bulā lo mujhe chāho jis vaqt
maiñ gayā vaqt nahīñ huuñ ki phir aa bhī na sakūñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
miltī hai ḳhū-e-yār se naar iltihāb meñ
kāfir huuñ gar na miltī ho rāhat azaab meñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
mirī hastī fazā-e-hairat ābād-e-tamannā hai
jise kahte haiñ naala vo usī aalam kā anqā hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
muddat huī hai yaar ko mehmāñ kiye hue
josh-e-qadah se bazm charāġhāñ kiye hue
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
mujh ko dayār-e-ġhair meñ maarā vatan se duur
rakh lī mire ḳhudā ne mirī bekasī kī sharm
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
muñd ga.iiñ kholte hī kholte āñkheñ 'ġhālib'
yaar laa.e mirī bālīñ pe use par kis vaqt
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
muzhda ai zauq-e-asīrī ki nazar aatā hai
dām-e-ḳhālī qafas-e-murġh-e-giraftār ke paas
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
na gul-e-naġhma huuñ na parda-e-sāz
maiñ huuñ apnī shikast kī āvāz
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
na hogā yak-bayābāñ māñdgī se zauq kam merā
habāb-e-mauja-e-raftār hai naqsh-e-qadam merā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
na huī gar mire marne se tasallī na sahī
imtihāñ aur bhī baaqī ho to ye bhī na sahī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
na leve gar ḳhas-e-jauhar tarāvat sabza-e-ḳhat se
lagā.e ḳhāna-e-ā.īna meñ rū-e-nigār ātish
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
na pūchh nusḳha-e-marham jarāhat-e-dil kā
ki us meñ reza-e-almās juzv-e-āzam hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
na thā kuchh to ḳhudā thā kuchh na hotā to ḳhudā hotā
Duboyā mujh ko hone ne na hotā maiñ to kyā hotā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
naala juz husn-e-talab ai sitam-ījād nahīñ
hai taqāzā-e-jafā shikva-e-bedād nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
nafas na anjuman-e-ārzū se bāhar khīñch
agar sharāb nahīñ intizār-e-sāġhar khīñch
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
nahīñ hai zaḳhm koī baḳhiye ke dar-ḳhur mire tan meñ
huā hai tār-e-ashk-e-yās rishta chashm-e-sozan meñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
nahīñ ki mujh ko qayāmat kā e'tiqād nahīñ
shab-e-firāq se roz-e-jazā ziyād nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
naqsh-e-nāz-e-but-e-tannāz ba-āġhosh-e-raqīb
pā-e-tā.ūs pa.e-ḳhāma-e-mānī māñge
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
naqsh fariyādī hai kis kī shoḳhi-e-tahrīr kā
kāġhzī hai pairahan har paikar-e-tasvīr kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
nashsha-hā shādāb-e-rañg o sāz-hā mast-e-tarab
shīsha-e-mai sarv-e-sabz-e-jū-e-bār-e-naġhma hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
naved-e-amn hai bedād-e-dost jaañ ke liye
rahī na tarz-e-sitam koī āsmāñ ke liye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
nikohish hai sazā fariyādi-e-be-dād-e-dilbar kī
mabādā ḳhanda-e-dandāñ-numā ho sub.h mahshar kī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
nukta-chīñ hai ġham-e-dil us ko sunā.e na bane
kyā bane baat jahāñ baat banā.e na bane
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ohde se mad.h-e-nāz ke bāhar na aa sakā
gar ik adā ho to use apnī qazā kahūñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
pā-ba-dāman ho rahā huuñ bas-ki maiñ sahrā-navard
ḳhār-e-pā haiñ jauhar-e-ā.īna-e-zānū mujhe
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
pa.e-nazr-e-karam tohfa hai sharm-e-nā-rasā.ī kā
ba-ḳhūñ-ġhaltīda-e-sad-rañg da.avā pārsā.ī kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
phir huā vaqt ki ho bāl-kushā mauj-e-sharāb
de bat-e-mai ko dil-o-dast-e-shanā mauj-e-sharāb
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
phir is andāz se bahār aa.ī
ki hue mehr-o-mah tamāshā.ī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
phir kuchh ik dil ko be-qarārī hai
siina juyā-e-zaḳhm-e-kārī hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
phir mujhe dīda-e-tar yaad aayā
dil jigar tishna-e-faryād aayā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
pīnas meñ guzarte haiñ jo kūche se vo mere
kandhā bhī kahāroñ ko badalne nahīñ dete
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
qafas meñ huuñ gar achchhā bhī na jāneñ mere shevan ko
mirā honā burā kyā hai navā-sanjān-e-gulshan ko
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
qatra-e-mai bas-ki hairat se nafas-parvar huā
ḳhatt-e-jām-e-mai sarāsar rishta-e-gauhar huā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
qayāmat hai ki sun lailā kā dasht-e-qais meñ aanā
ta.ajjub se vo bolā yuuñ bhī hotā hai zamāne meñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
raftār-e-umr qat-e-rah-e-iztirāb hai
is saal ke hisāb ko barq āftāb hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
rahā gar koī tā-qayāmat salāmat
phir ik roz marnā hai hazrat-salāmat
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
rahiye ab aisī jagah chal kar jahāñ koī na ho
ham-suḳhan koī na ho aur ham-zabāñ koī na ho
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
rahm kar zālim ki kyā būd-e-charāġh-e-kushta hai
nabz-e-bīmār-e-vafā dūd-e-charāġh-e-kushta hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
rashk kahtā hai ki us kā ġhair se iḳhlās haif
aql kahtī hai ki vo be-mehr kis kā āshnā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
roñdī huī hai kaukaba-e-shahryār kī
itrā.e kyuuñ na ḳhaak sar-e-rahguzār kī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
rone se aur ishq meñ bebāk ho ga.e
dho.e ga.e ham itne ki bas paak ho ga.e
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ruḳh-e-nigār se hai soz-e-jāvidānī-e-sham.a
huī hai ātish-e-gul āb-e-zindagānī-e-sham.a
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
sādgī par us kī mar jaane kī hasrat dil meñ hai
bas nahīñ chaltā ki phir ḳhanjar kaf-e-qātil meñ hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
sab kahāñ kuchh lāla-o-gul meñ numāyāñ ho ga.iiñ
ḳhaak meñ kyā sūrateñ hoñgī ki pinhāñ ho ga.iiñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
sad jalva rū-ba-rū hai jo mizhgāñ uThā.iye
tāqat kahāñ ki diid kā ehsāñ uThā.iye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
safā-e-hairat-e-ā.īna hai sāmān-e-zang āḳhir
taġhayyur āb-e-bar-jā-māñda kā paatā hai rañg āḳhir
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
sar-gashtagī meñ ālam-e-hastī se yaas hai
taskīñ ko de naved ki marne kī aas hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
sarāpā rehn-e-ishq-o-nā-guzīr-e-ulfat-e-hastī
ibādat barq kī kartā huuñ aur afsos hāsil kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
satā.ish-gar hai zāhid is qadar jis bāġh-e-rizvāñ kā
vo ik guldasta hai ham be-ḳhudoñ ke tāq-e-nisyāñ kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
shab ḳhumār-e-shauq-e-sāqī rustaḳhez-andāza thā
tā-muhīt-e-bāda sūrat ḳhāna-e-ḳhamyāza thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
shab ki barq-e-soz-e-dil se zahra-e-abr aab thā
sho.ala-e-javvāla har yak halqa-e-girdāb thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
shab ki vo majlis-faroz-e-ḳhalvat-e-nāmūs thā
rishta-e-har-sham.a ḳhār-e-kisvat-e-fānūs thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
shabnam ba-gul-e-lāla na ḳhālī z-adā hai
dāġh-e-dil-e-bedard nazar-gāh-e-hayā hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
shauq har rañg raqīb-e-sar-o-sāmāñ niklā
qais tasvīr ke parde meñ bhī uryāñ niklā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
shikve ke naam se be-mehr ḳhafā hotā hai
ye bhī mat kah ki jo kahiye to gila hotā hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
shumār-e-sub.ha marġhūb-e-but-e-mushkil-pasand aayā
tamāshā-e-ba-yak-kaf burdan-e-sad-dil-pasand aayā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
sīmāb-pusht garmi-e-ā.īna de hai ham
hairāñ kiye hue haiñ dil-e-be-qarār ke
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
sitam-kash maslahat se huuñ ki ḳhūbāñ tujh pe āshiq haiñ
takalluf bartaraf mil jā.egā tujh sā raqīb āḳhir
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
siyāhī jaise gir jaa.e dam-e-tahrīr kāġhaz par
mirī qismat meñ yuuñ tasvīr hai shab-hā-e-hijrāñ kī
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
surma-e-muft-e-nazar huuñ mirī qīmat ye hai
ki rahe chashm-e-ḳharīdār pe ehsāñ merā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
tā ham ko shikāyat kī bhī baaqī na rahe jā
sun lete haiñ go zikr hamārā nahīñ karte
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
taġhāful-dost huuñ merā dimāġh-e-ajz aalī hai
agar pahlū-tahī kiije to jā merī bhī ḳhālī hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
tapish se merī vaqf-e-kashmakash har tār-e-bistar hai
mirā sar rañj-e-bālīñ hai mirā tan bār-e-bistar hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
taskīñ ko ham na ro.eñ jo zauq-e-nazar mile
hūrān-e-ḳhuld meñ tirī sūrat magar mile
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
tere tausan ko sabā bāñdhte haiñ
ham bhī mazmūñ kī havā bāñdhte haiñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
tum apne shikve kī bāteñ na khod khod ke pūchho
hazar karo mire dil se ki is meñ aag dabī hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
tum jaano tum ko ġhair se jo rasm-o-rāh ho
mujh ko bhī pūchhte raho to kyā gunāh ho
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
tū dost kasū kā bhī sitamgar na huā thā
auroñ pe hai vo zulm ki mujh par na huā thā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ug rahā hai dar-o-dīvār se sabza 'ġhālib'
ham bayābāñ meñ haiñ aur ghar meñ bahār aa.ī hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
us bazm meñ mujhe nahīñ bantī hayā kiye
baiThā rahā agarche ishāre huā kiye
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
vaañ pahuñch kar jo ġhash aatā pa.e-ham hai ham ko
sad-rah āhañg-e-zamīñ bos-e-qadam hai ham ko
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
vaañ us ko haul-e-dil hai to yaañ maiñ huuñ sharm-sār
ya.anī ye merī aah kī tāsīr se na ho
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
vārasta us se haiñ ki mohabbat hī kyuuñ na ho
kiije hamāre saath adāvat hī kyuuñ na ho
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
vo aa ke ḳhvāb meñ taskīn-e-iztirāb to de
vale mujhe tapish-e-dil majāl-e-ḳhvāb to de
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
vo firāq aur vo visāl kahāñ
vo shab-o-roz o māh-o-sāl kahāñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
vo mirī chīn-e-jabīñ se ġham-e-pinhāñ samjhā
rāz-e-maktūb ba-be-rabti-e-unvāñ samjhā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
vus.at-e-sa.i-e-karam dekh ki sar-tā-sar-e-ḳhāk
guzre hai ābla-pā abr-e-guhar-bār hunūz
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
yaad hai shādī meñ bhī hañgāma-e-yā-rab mujhe
sub.ha-e-zāhid huā hai ḳhanda zer-e-lab mujhe
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
yak-zarra-e-zamīñ nahīñ be-kār baaġh kā
yaañ jaada bhī fatīla hai laale ke daaġh kā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ye ham jo hijr meñ dīvār-o-dar ko dekhte haiñ
kabhī sabā ko kabhī nāma-bar ko dekhte haiñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
ye na thī hamārī qismat ki visāl-e-yār hotā
agar aur jiite rahte yahī intizār hotā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
za-bas-ki mashq-e-tamāshā junūñ-alāmat hai
kushād-o-bast-e-mizhah sīli-e-nadāmat hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
zaḳhm par chhiḌkeñ kahāñ tiflān-e-be-parvā namak
kyā maza hotā agar patthar meñ bhī hotā namak
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
zamāna saḳht kam-āzār hai ba-jān-e-asad
vagarna ham to tavaqqo.a ziyāda rakhte haiñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
zikr merā ba-badī bhī use manzūr nahīñ
ġhair kī baat bigaḌ jaa.e to kuchh duur nahīñ
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
zikr us parī-vash kā aur phir bayāñ apnā
ban gayā raqīb āḳhir thā jo rāz-dāñ apnā
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
zindagī apnī jab is shakl se guzrī 'ġhālib'
ham bhī kyā yaad kareñge ki ḳhudā rakhte the
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
zulmat-kade meñ mere shab-e-ġham kā josh hai
ik sham.a hai dalīl-e-sahar so ḳhamosh hai
author: — mirza ghalib

text:
aap kī aañkh se gahrā hai mirī ruuh kā zaḳhm
aap kyā soch sakeñge mirī tanhā.ī ko
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ab ke bārish meñ to ye kār-e-ziyāñ honā hī thā
apnī kachchī bastiyoñ ko be-nishāñ honā hī thā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ab vo tūfāñ hai na vo shor havāoñ jaisā
dil kā aalam hai tire ba.ad ḳhalāoñ jaisā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ab ye sochūñ to bhañvar zehn meñ paḌ jaate haiñ
kaise chehre haiñ jo milte hī bichhaḌ jaate haiñ
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
agarche maiñ ik chaTān sā aadmī rahā huuñ
magar tire ba.ad hausla hai ki jī rahā huuñ
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ajiib ḳhauf musallat thā kal havelī par
lahu charāġh jalātī rahī hathelī par
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ashk apnā ki tumhārā nahīñ dekhā jaatā
abr kī zad meñ sitārā nahīñ dekhā jaatā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
azāb-e-dīd meñ āñkheñ lahū lahū kar ke
maiñ sharmsār huā terī justujū kar ke
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ba-nām-e-tāqat koī ishāra nahīñ chalegā
udaas nasloñ pe ab ijāra nahīñ chalegā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
bhaḌkā.eñ mirī pyaas ko aksar tirī āñkheñ
sahrā mirā chehrā hai samundar tirī āñkheñ
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
bichhaḌ ke mujh se ye mashġhala iḳhtiyār karnā
havā se Darnā bujhe charāġhoñ se pyaar karnā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ek pal meñ zindagī bhar kī udāsī de gayā
vo judā hote hue kuchh phuul baasī de gayā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
fazā kā habs shagūfoñ ko baas kyā degā
badan-darīda kisī ko libās kyā degā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ġhazloñ kī dhanak oḌh mire sho.ala-badan tū
hai merā suḳhan tū mirā mauzū-e-suḳhan tū
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ham jo pahuñche sar-e-maqtal to ye manzar dekhā
sab se ūñchā thā jo sar nok-e-sināñ par dekhā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
har ek shab yūñhī dekheñgī sū-e-dar āñkheñ
tujhe gañvā ke na so.eñgī umr-bhar āñkheñ
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
havā-e-hijr meñ jo kuchh thā ab ke ḳhaak huā
ki pairahan to gayā thā badan bhī chaak huā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
itnī muddat ba.ad mile ho
kin sochoñ meñ gum phirte ho
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
jab hijr ke shahr meñ dhuup utrī maiñ jaag paḌā to ḳhvāb huā
mirī soch ḳhizāñ kī shāḳh banī tirā chehra aur gulāb huā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
jab se us ne shahr ko chhoḌā har rasta sunsān huā
apnā kyā hai saare shahr kā ik jaisā nuqsān huā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
jugnū guhar charāġh ujāle to de gayā
vo ḳhud ko DhūñDne ke havāle to de gayā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
kaThin tanhā.iyoñ se kaun khelā maiñ akelā
bharā ab bhī mire gaañv kā mela maiñ akelā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ḳhud apne dil meñ ḳharāsheñ utārnā hoñgī
abhī to jaag ke rāteñ guzārnā hoñgī
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ḳhumār-e-mausam-e-ḳhushbū had-e-chaman meñ khulā
mirī ġhazal kā ḳhazāna tire badan meñ khulā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
kis ne sañg-e-ḳhāmoshī pheñkā bhare-bāzār par
ik sukūt-e-marg taarī hai dar-o-dīvār par
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
laboñ pe harf-e-rajaz hai zirah utaar ke bhī
maiñ jashn-e-fat.h manātā huuñ jañg haar ke bhī
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ma.arka ab ke huā bhī to phir aisā hogā
tere dariyā pe mirī pyaas kā pahra hogā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
maiñ chup rahā ki zahr yahī mujh ko raas thā
vo sañg-e-lafz pheñk ke kitnā udaas thā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
maiñ dil pe jabr karūñgā tujhe bhulā dūñgā
marūñgā ḳhud bhī tujhe bhī kaḌī sazā dūñgā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
maiñ kal tanhā thā ḳhilqat so rahī thī
mujhe ḳhud se bhī vahshat ho rahī thī
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
nayā hai shahr na.e aasre talāsh karūñ
tū kho gayā hai kahāñ ab tujhe talāsh karūñ
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
phir vahī maiñ huuñ vahī shahr-badar sannāTā
mujh ko Das le na kahīñ ḳhāk-basar sannāTā
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
qatl chhupte the kabhī sañg kī dīvār ke beach
ab to khulne lage maqtal bhare bāzār ke beach
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
sāñsoñ ke is hunar ko na āsāñ ḳhayāl kar
zinda huuñ sā.atoñ ko maiñ sadiyoñ meñ Dhaal kar
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
saare lahje tire be-zamāñ ek maiñ
is bhare shahr meñ rā.egāñ ek maiñ
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
tire badan se jo chhū kar idhar bhī aatā hai
misāl-e-rañg vo jhoñkā nazar bhī aatā hai
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ujaḌ ujaḌ ke sañvartī hai tere hijr kī shaam
na pūchh kaise guzartī hai tere hijr kī shaam
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ujḌe hue logoñ se gurezāñ na huā kar
hālāt kī qabroñ ke ye katbe bhī paḌhā kar
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
vo dilāvar jo siyah shab ke shikārī nikle
vo bhī chaḌhte hue sūraj ke pujārī nikle
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ye dil ye pāgal dil mirā kyuuñ bujh gayā āvārgī
is dasht meñ ik shahr thā vo kyā huā āvārgī
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ye kah ga.e haiñ musāfir luTe gharoñ vaale
Dareñ havā se parinde khule paroñ vaale
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
zabāñ rakhtā huuñ lekin chup khaḌā huuñ
maiñ āvāzoñ ke ban meñ ghir gayā huuñ
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
zaḳhm ke phuul se taskīn talab kartī hai
ba.az auqāt mirī ruuh ġhazab kartī hai
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
zikr-e-shab-e-firāq se vahshat use bhī thī
merī tarah kisī se mohabbat use bhī thī
author: — mohsin naqvi

text:
ai sabā kah bahār kī bāteñ
is but-e-gul-ezār kī bāteñ
author: — naji shakir

text:
dekh mohan tirī kamar kī taraf
phir gayā maanī apne ghar kī taraf
author: — naji shakir

text:
dekhī bahār ham ne kal zor mai-kade meñ
hañsne siiñ us sajan ke thā shor mai-kade meñ
author: — naji shakir

text:
dil kā khoj na paayā hargiz dekhā khol jo qabroñ ko
jiite jī DhūñDe so paave ḳhabar karo be-ḳhabroñ ko
author: — naji shakir

text:
kamar kī baat sunte haiñ ye kuchh paa.ī nahīñ jaatī
kahe haiñ baat aisī ḳhayāl meñ mere nahīñ aatī
author: — naji shakir

text:
lab-e-shīrīñ hai misrī yūsuf-e-sānī hai ye laḌkā
na chhoḌegā merā dil chāh-e-kan.ānī hai ye laḌkā
author: — naji shakir

text:
mah-ruḳhāñ kī jo mehrbānī hai
ye madad mujh pe āsmānī hai
author: — naji shakir

text:
tere bhaa.ī ko chāhā ab terī kartā huuñ pā-bosī
mujhe sartāj kar rakh jaan meñ āshiq huuñ maurūsī
author: — naji shakir

text:
ye daur guzrā kabhī na dekhīñ piyā kī añkhiyāñ ḳhumār-matiyāñ
kahe the mardum sharābī un kuuñ nikal ga.iiñ apnī de ġhalatiyāñ
author: — naji shakir

text:
zikr har sub.h o shaam hai terā
vird-e-āshiq kuuñ naam hai terā
author: — naji shakir

text:
dard kī dhuup se chehre ko nikhar jaanā thā
aa.ina dekhne vaale tujhe mar jaanā thā
author: — naseer turabi

text:
dekh lete haiñ ab us baam ko aate jaate
ye bhī āzār chalā jā.egā jaate jaate
author: — naseer turabi

text:
diyā sā dil ke ḳharābe meñ jal rahā hai miyāñ
diye ke gird koī aks chal rahā hai miyāñ
author: — naseer turabi

text:
ham-rahī kī baat mat kar imtihāñ ho jā.egā
ham subuk ho jā.eñge tujh ko girāñ ho jā.egā
author: — naseer turabi

text:
injīl-e-raftagāñ kī hadīsoñ ke saath huuñ
īsā-nafas huuñ aur salīboñ ke saath huuñ
author: — naseer turabi

text:
is kaḌī dhuup meñ saaya kar ke
tū kahāñ hai mujhe tanhā kar ke
author: — naseer turabi

text:
koī āvāz na aahaT na ḳhayāl aise meñ
raat mahkī hai magar jī hai niDhāl aise meñ
author: — naseer turabi

text:
maiñ bhī ai kaash kabhī mauj-e-sabā ho jā.ūñ
is tavaqqo pe ki ḳhud se bhī judā ho jā.ūñ
author: — naseer turabi

text:
marham-e-vaqt na ejāz-e-masīhā.ī hai
zindagī roz na.e zaḳhm kī gahrā.ī hai
author: — naseer turabi

text:
milne kī tarah mujh se vo pal bhar nahīñ miltā
dil us se milā jis se muqaddar nahīñ miltā
author: — naseer turabi

text:
misl-e-sahrā hai rifāqat kā chaman bhī ab ke
jal bujhā apne hī sho.aloñ meñ badan bhī ab ke
author: — naseer turabi

text:
rache-base hue lamhoñ se jab hisāb huā
ga.e dinoñ kī rutoñ kā ziyāñ savāb huā
author: — naseer turabi

text:
sabā kā narm sā jhoñkā bhī tāziyāna huā
ye vaar mujh pe huā bhī to ġhā.ebāna huā
author: — naseer turabi

text:
sukūt-e-shām se ghabrā na jaa.e āḳhir tū
mire dayār se guzrī jo ai kiran phir tū
author: — naseer turabi

text:
tujhe kyā ḳhabar mire be-ḳhabar mirā silsila koī aur hai
jo mujhī ko mujh se baham kare vo gurez-pā koī aur hai
author: — naseer turabi

text:
vo ham-safar thā magar us se ham-navā.ī na thī
ki dhuup chhāñv kā aalam rahā judā.ī na thī
author: — naseer turabi

text:
aa gayā phir ramazāñ kyā hogā
haa.e ai pīr-e-muġhāñ kyā hogā
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
aa ke mujh tak kashtī-e-mai sāqiyā ulTī phirī
aaj kyā naddī bahī ulTī havā ulTī phirī
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
abas hai nāz-e-istiġhnā pe kal kī kyā ḳhabar kyā ho
ḳhudā ma.alūm ye sāmān kyā ho jaa.e sar kyā ho
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
bid.at masnūn ho ga.ī hai
ummat mat.ūn ho ga.ī hai
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
ehsān le na himmat-e-mardāna chhoḌ kar
rasta bhī chal tū sabza-e-begāna chhoḌ kar
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
hañsī meñ vo baat maiñ ne kah dī ki rah ga.e aap dañg ho kar
chhupā huā thā jo raaz dil meñ khulā vo chehre kā rañg ho kar
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
is mahīna bhar kahāñ thā sāqiyā achchhī tarah
aa idhar aa iid to mil leñ zarā achchhī tarah
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
is vāste adam kī manzil ko DhūñDte haiñ
muddat se dostoñ kī mahfil ko DhūñDte haiñ
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
junūñ ke valvale jab ghuT ga.e dil meñ nihāñ ho kar
to uTThe haiñ dhuāñ ho kar gire haiñ bijliyāñ ho kar
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
kis liye phirte haiñ ye shams o qamar donoñ saath
kis ko ye DhūñDte haiñ barhana-sar donoñ saath
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
kisī se bas ki umīd-e-kushūd-e-kār nahīñ
mujhe ajal ke bhī aane kā e'tibār nahīñ
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
koī mai de yā na de ham riñd-e-be-parvā haiñ aap
sāqiyā apnī baġhal meñ shīsha-e-sahbā haiñ aap
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
kyā kārvān-e-hastī guzrā ravā-ravī meñ
fardā ko maiñ ne dekhā gard-o-ġhubār-e-dī meñ
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
kyā kaheñ kis se pyaar kar baiThe
apne dil ko figār kar baiThe
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
mujh ko samjho yādgār-e-raftagān-e-lucknow
huuñ qadd-e-āmdam ġhubār-e-kārvān-e-lucknow
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
nadāmat hai banā kar is chaman meñ āshiyāñ mujh ko
milā hamdam yahāñ koī na koī ham-zabāñ mujh ko
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
phirī huī mirī āñkheñ haiñ teġh-zan kī taraf
chalā hai chhoḌ ke bismil mujhe hiran kī taraf
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
pursish jo hogī tujh se jallād kyā karegā
le ḳhuun maiñ ne baḳhshā tū yaad kyā karegā
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
sañg-e-jafā kā ġham nahīñ dast-e-talab kā Dar nahīñ
apnā hai us par āshiyāñ naḳhl jo bārvar nahīñ
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
sub.ha hai zunnār kyuuñ kaisī kahī
zāhid-e-ayyār kyuuñ kaisī kahī
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
tanhā nahīñ huuñ gar dil-e-dīvāna saath hai
vo harzah-gard huuñ ki parī-ḳhāna saath hai
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
uḌā kar kaag shīshe se mai-e-gul-gūñ nikaltī hai
sharābī jam.a haiñ mai-ḳhāna meñ Topī uchhaltī hai
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
ye āh-e-be-asar kyā ho ye naḳhl-e-be-samar kyā ho
na ho jab dard hī yārab to dil kyā ho jigar kyā ho
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
ye huā ma.aal hubāb kā jo havā meñ bhar ke ubhar gayā
ki sadā hai lutma-e-mauj kī sar-e-pur-ġhurūr kidhar gayā
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
yuuñ maiñ sīdhā gayā vahshat meñ bayābāñ kī taraf
haath jis tarah se aatā hai garebāñ kī taraf
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
yuuñ to na tere jism meñ haiñ zīnhār haath
dene ke ai karīm magar haiñ hazār haath
author: — nazm tabatabai

text:
aa.egā koī chal ke ḳhizāñ se bahār meñ
sadiyāñ guzar ga.ī haiñ isī intizār meñ
author: — nida fazli

text:
aaj zarā fursat paa.ī thī aaj use phir yaad kiyā
band galī ke āḳhirī ghar ko khol ke phir ābād kiyā
author: — nida fazli

text:
aanī jaanī har mohabbat hai chalo yuuñ hī sahī
jab talak hai ḳhūb-sūrat hai chalo yuuñ hī sahī
author: — nida fazli

text:
ab ḳhushī hai na koī dard rulāne vaalā
ham ne apnā liyā har rañg zamāne vaalā
author: — nida fazli

text:
achchhī nahīñ ye ḳhāmushī shikva karo gila karo
yuuñ bhī na kar sako to phir ghar meñ ḳhudā ḳhudā karo
author: — nida fazli

text:
apnā ġham le ke kahīñ aur na jaayā jaa.e
ghar meñ bikhrī huī chīzoñ ko sajāyā jaa.e
author: — nida fazli

text:
apnī marzī se kahāñ apne safar ke ham haiñ
ruḳh havāoñ kā jidhar kā hai udhar ke ham haiñ
author: — nida fazli

text:
be-nām sā ye dard Thahar kyuuñ nahīñ jaatā
jo biit gayā hai vo guzar kyuuñ nahīñ jaatā
author: — nida fazli

text:
besan kī sauñdhī roTī par khaTTī chaTnī jaisī maañ
yaad aatī hai! chaukā bāsan chimTā phuknī jaisī maañ
author: — nida fazli

text:
dariyā ho yā pahāḌ ho Takrānā chāhiye
jab tak na saañs TuuTe jiye jaanā chāhiye
author: — nida fazli

text:
dekhā huā sā kuchh hai to sochā huā sā kuchh
har vaqt mere saath hai uljhā huā sā kuchh
author: — nida fazli

text:
dhuup meñ niklo ghaTāoñ meñ nahā kar dekho
zindagī kyā hai kitāboñ ko haTā kar dekho
author: — nida fazli

text:
dil meñ na ho jur.at to mohabbat nahīñ miltī
ḳhairāt meñ itnī baḌī daulat nahīñ miltī
author: — nida fazli

text:
din salīqe se ugā raat Thikāne se rahī
dostī apnī bhī kuchh roz zamāne se rahī
author: — nida fazli

text:
do chaar gaam raah ko hamvār dekhnā
phir har qadam pe ik na.ī dīvār dekhnā
author: — nida fazli

text:
duniyā jise kahte haiñ jaadū kā khilaunā hai
mil jaa.e to miTTī hai kho jaa.e to sonā hai
author: — nida fazli

text:
ek hī dhartī ham sab kā ghar jitnā terā utnā merā
dukh sukh kā ye jantar-mantar jitnā terā utnā merā
author: — nida fazli

text:
garaj-baras pyāsī dhartī par phir paanī de maulā
chiḌiyoñ ko daane bachchoñ ko guḌ-dhānī de maulā
author: — nida fazli

text:
ghar se nikle to ho sochā bhī kidhar jāoge
har taraf tez havā.eñ haiñ bikhar jāoge
author: — nida fazli

text:
girjā meñ mandiroñ meñ azānoñ meñ baT gayā
hote hī sub.h aadmī ḳhānoñ meñ baT gayā
author: — nida fazli

text:
har ek baat ko chup-chāp kyuuñ sunā jaa.e
kabhī to hausla kar ke nahīñ kahā jaa.e
author: — nida fazli

text:
har ek ghar meñ diyā bhī jale anaaj bhī ho
agar na ho kahīñ aisā to ehtijāj bhī ho
author: — nida fazli

text:
har ghaḌī ḳhud se ulajhnā hai muqaddar merā
maiñ hī kashtī huuñ mujhī meñ hai samundar merā
author: — nida fazli

text:
har taraf har jagah be-shumār aadmī
phir bhī tanhā.iyoñ kā shikār aadmī
author: — nida fazli

text:
hosh vāloñ ko ḳhabar kyā be-ḳhudī kyā chiiz hai
ishq kiije phir samjhiye zindagī kyā chiiz hai
author: — nida fazli

text:
insān meñ haivān yahāñ bhī hai vahāñ bhī
allāh nigahbān yahāñ bhī hai vahāñ bhī
author: — nida fazli

text:
jab se qarīb ho ke chale zindagī se ham
ḳhud apne aa.ine ko lage ajnabī se ham
author: — nida fazli

text:
jise dekhte hī ḳhumārī lage
use umr saarī hamārī lage
author: — nida fazli

text:
jo ho ik baar vo har baar ho aisā nahīñ hotā
hamesha ek hī se pyaar ho aisā nahīñ hotā
author: — nida fazli

text:
kabhī kabhī yuuñ bhī ham ne apne jī ko bahlāyā hai
jin bātoñ ko ḳhud nahīñ samjhe auroñ ko samjhāyā hai
author: — nida fazli

text:
kabhī kisī ko mukammal jahāñ nahīñ miltā
kahīñ zamīn kahīñ āsmāñ nahīñ miltā
author: — nida fazli

text:
kaTh-putlī hai yā jīvan hai jiite jaao socho mat
soch se hī saarī uljhan hai jiite jaao socho mat
author: — nida fazli

text:
koī hindū koī muslim koī īsā.ī hai
sab ne insān na banñe kī qasam khaa.ī hai
author: — nida fazli

text:
koshish ke bāvajūd ye ilzām rah gayā
har kaam meñ hamesha koī kaam rah gayā
author: — nida fazli

text:
kuchh bhī bachā na kahne ko har baat ho ga.ī
aao kahīñ sharāb piyeñ raat ho ga.ī
author: — nida fazli

text:
kuchh tabī.at hī milī thī aisī chain se jiine kī sūrat na huī
jis ko chāhā use apnā na sake jo milā us se mohabbat na huī
author: — nida fazli

text:
maiñ apne iḳhtiyār meñ huuñ bhī nahīñ bhī huuñ
duniyā ke kārobār meñ huuñ bhī nahīñ bhī huuñ
author: — nida fazli

text:
man bai-rāgī tan anūrāgī qadam qadam dushvārī hai
jīvan jiinā sahl na jaano bahut baḌī fankārī hai
author: — nida fazli

text:
mohabbat meñ vafādārī se bachiye
jahāñ tak ho adākārī se bachiye
author: — nida fazli

text:
muñh kī baat sune har koī dil ke dard ko jaane kaun
āvāzoñ ke bāzāroñ meñ ḳhāmoshī pahchāne kaun
author: — nida fazli

text:
muTThī bhar logoñ ke hāthoñ meñ lākhoñ kī taqdīreñ haiñ
judā judā haiñ dharm ilāqe ek sī lekin zanjīreñ haiñ
author: — nida fazli

text:
na jaane kaun sā manzar nazar meñ rahtā hai
tamām umr musāfir safar meñ rahtā hai
author: — nida fazli

text:
nazdīkiyoñ meñ duur kā manzar talāsh kar
jo haath meñ nahīñ hai vo patthar talāsh kar
author: — nida fazli

text:
raat ke ba.ad na.e din kī sahar aa.egī
din nahīñ badlegā tārīḳh badal jā.egī
author: — nida fazli

text:
safar meñ dhuup to hogī jo chal sako to chalo
sabhī haiñ bhiiḌ meñ tum bhī nikal sako to chalo
author: — nida fazli

text:
tanhā tanhā dukh jheleñge mahfil mahfil gā.eñge
jab tak aañsū paas raheñge tab tak giit sunā.eñge
author: — nida fazli

text:
us ke dushman haiñ bahut aadmī achchhā hogā
vo bhī merī hī tarah shahr meñ tanhā hogā
author: — nida fazli

text:
us ko kho dene kā ehsās to kam baaqī hai
jo huā vo na huā hotā ye ġham baaqī hai
author: — nida fazli

text:
yaqīn chāñd pe sūraj meñ e'tibār bhī rakh
magar nigāh meñ thoḌā sā intizār bhī rakh
author: — nida fazli

text:
ye kaisī kashmakash hai zindagī meñ
kisī ko DhūñDte haiñ ham kisī meñ
author: — nida fazli

text:
hasrat-e-intizār-e-yār na pūchh
haa.e vo shiddat-e-intizār na pūchh
author: — noon meem rashid

text:
jo be-sabāt ho us sarḳhushī ko kyā kiije
ye zindagī hai to phir zindagī ko kyā kiije
author: — noon meem rashid

text:
tire karam se ḳhudā.ī meñ yuuñ to kyā na milā
magar jo tū na milā ziist kā mazā na milā
author: — noon meem rashid

text:
tū āshnā-e-jazba-e-ulfat nahīñ rahā
dil meñ tire vo zauq-e-mohabbat nahīñ rahā
author: — noon meem rashid

text:
ab bhalā chhoḌ ke ghar kyā karte
shaam ke vaqt safar kyā karte
author: — parveen shakir

text:
ab itnī sādgī laa.eñ kahāñ se
zamīñ kī ḳhair māñgeñ āsmāñ se
author: — parveen shakir

text:
agarche tujh se bahut iḳhtilāf bhī na huā
magar ye dil tirī jānib se saaf bhī na huā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
aks-e-ḳhushbū huuñ bikharne se na roke koī
aur bikhar jā.ūñ to mujh ko na sameTe koī
author: — parveen shakir

text:
apnī hī sadā sunūñ kahāñ tak
jañgal kī havā rahūñ kahāñ tak
author: — parveen shakir

text:
apnī rusvā.ī tire naam kā charchā dekhūñ
ik zarā sher kahūñ aur maiñ kyā kyā dekhūñ
author: — parveen shakir

text:
apnī tanhā.ī mire naam pe ābād kare
kaun hogā jo mujhe us kī tarah yaad kare
author: — parveen shakir

text:
ashk aañkh meñ phir aTak rahā hai
kañkar sā koī khaTak rahā hai
author: — parveen shakir

text:
bādbāñ khulne se pahle kā ishāra dekhnā
maiñ samundar dekhtī huuñ tum kināra dekhnā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
bārish huī to phūloñ ke tan chaak ho ga.e
mausam ke haath bhiig ke saffāk ho ga.e
author: — parveen shakir

text:
bahut royā vo ham ko yaad kar ke
hamārī zindagī barbād kar ke
author: — parveen shakir

text:
bajā ki aañkh meñ nīndoñ ke silsile bhī nahīñ
shikast-e-ḳhvāb ke ab mujh meñ hausle bhī nahīñ
author: — parveen shakir

text:
baḳht se koī shikāyat hai na aflāk se hai
yahī kyā kam hai ki nisbat mujhe is ḳhaak se hai
author: — parveen shakir

text:
bichhḌā hai jo ik baar to milte nahīñ dekhā
is zaḳhm ko ham ne kabhī silte nahīñ dekhā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
chārasāzoñ kī aziyyat nahīñ dekhī jaatī
tere bīmār kī hālat nahīñ dekhī jaatī
author: — parveen shakir

text:
chalne kā hausla nahīñ ruknā muhāl kar diyā
ishq ke is safar ne to mujh ko niDhāl kar diyā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
charāġh-e-rāh bujhā kyā ki rahnumā bhī gayā
havā ke saath musāfir kā naqsh-e-pā bhī gayā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
Dasne lage haiñ ḳhvāb magar kis se boliye
maiñ jāntī thī paal rahī huuñ sañpoliye
author: — parveen shakir

text:
dhanak dhanak mirī poroñ ke ḳhvāb kar degā
vo lams mere badan ko gulāb kar degā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
dil kā kyā hai vo to chāhegā musalsal milnā
vo sitamgar bhī magar soche kisī pal milnā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
duā kā TuuTā huā harf sard aah meñ hai
tirī judā.ī kā manzar abhī nigāh meñ hai
author: — parveen shakir

text:
ek sūraj thā ki tāroñ ke gharāne se uThā
aañkh hairān hai kyā shaḳhs zamāne se uThā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
ga.e mausam meñ jo khilte the gulāboñ kī tarah
dil pe utreñge vahī ḳhvāb azāboñ kī tarah
author: — parveen shakir

text:
gavāhī kaise TūTtī muāmla ḳhudā kā thā
mirā aur us kā rābta to haath aur duā kā thā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
gulāb haath meñ ho aañkh meñ sitāra ho
koī vajūd mohabbat kā isti.āra ho
author: — parveen shakir

text:
ham ne hī lauTne kā irāda nahīñ kiyā
us ne bhī bhuul jaane kā va.ada nahīñ kiyā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
harf-e-tāza na.ī ḳhushbū meñ likhā chāhtā hai
baab ik aur mohabbat kā khulā chāhtā hai
author: — parveen shakir

text:
ik hunar thā kamāl thā kyā thā
mujh meñ terā jamāl thā kyā thā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
justujū kho.e huoñ kī umr bhar karte rahe
chāñd ke hamrāh ham har shab safar karte rahe
author: — parveen shakir

text:
kamāl-e-zabt ko ḳhud bhī to āzmā.ūñgī
maiñ apne haath se us kī dulhan sajā.ūñgī
author: — parveen shakir

text:
khulī āñkhoñ meñ sapnā jhāñktā hai
vo soyā hai ki kuchh kuchh jāgtā hai
author: — parveen shakir

text:
kuchh faisla to ho ki kidhar jaanā chāhiye
paanī ko ab to sar se guzar jaanā chāhiye
author: — parveen shakir

text:
kuchh to havā bhī sard thī kuchh thā tirā ḳhayāl bhī
dil ko ḳhushī ke saath saath hotā rahā malāl bhī
author: — parveen shakir

text:
kū-ba-kū phail ga.ī baat shanāsā.ī kī
us ne ḳhushbū kī tarah merī pazīrā.ī kī
author: — parveen shakir

text:
kyā kare merī masīhā.ī bhī karne vaalā
zaḳhm hī ye mujhe lagtā nahīñ bharne vaalā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
mushkil hai ki ab shahr meñ nikle koī ghar se
dastār pe baat aa ga.ī hotī huī sar se
author: — parveen shakir

text:
pā-ba-gil sab haiñ rihā.ī kī kare tadbīr kaun
dast-basta shahr meñ khole mirī zanjīr kaun
author: — parveen shakir

text:
puurā dukh aur aadhā chāñd
hijr kī shab aur aisā chāñd
author: — parveen shakir

text:
qadmoñ meñ bhī takān thī ghar bhī qarīb thā
par kyā kareñ ki ab ke safar hī ajiib thā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
qaid meñ guzregī jo umr baḌe kaam kī thī
par maiñ kyā kartī ki zanjīr tire naam kī thī
author: — parveen shakir

text:
rasta bhī kaThin dhuup meñ shiddat bhī bahut thī
saa.e se magar us ko mohabbat bhī bahut thī
author: — parveen shakir

text:
shab vahī lekin sitāra aur hai
ab safar kā isti.āra aur hai
author: — parveen shakir

text:
shauq-e-raqs se jab tak uñgliyāñ nahīñ khultīñ
paañv se havāoñ ke beḌiyāñ nahīñ khultīñ
author: — parveen shakir

text:
tarāsh kar mire baazū uḌaan chhoḌ gayā
havā ke paas barahna kamān chhoḌ gayā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
terā ghar aur merā jañgal bhīgtā hai saath saath
aisī barsāteñ ki bādal bhīgtā hai saath saath
author: — parveen shakir

text:
terī ḳhushbū kā patā kartī hai
mujh pe ehsān havā kartī hai
author: — parveen shakir

text:
TuuTī hai merī niiñd magar tum ko is se kyā
bajte raheñ havāoñ se dar tum ko is se kyā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
vaqt-e-ruḳhsat aa gayā dil phir bhī ghabrāyā nahīñ
us ko ham kyā kho.eñge jis ko kabhī paayā nahīñ
author: — parveen shakir

text:
vo ham nahīñ jinheñ sahnā ye jabr aa jaatā
tirī judā.ī meñ kis tarah sabr aa jaatā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
vo to ḳhush-bū hai havāoñ meñ bikhar jā.egā
mas.ala phuul kā hai phuul kidhar jā.egā
author: — parveen shakir

text:
ab aa.eñ yā na aa.eñ idhar pūchhte chalo
kyā chāhtī hai un kī nazar pūchhte chalo
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
ab koī gulshan na ujḌe ab vatan āzād hai
ruuh gañgā kī himāla kā badan āzād hai
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
ahl-e-dil aur bhī haiñ ahl-e-vafā aur bhī haiñ
ek ham hī nahīñ duniyā se ḳhafā aur bhī haiñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
apnā dil pesh karūñ apnī vafā pesh karūñ
kuchh samajh meñ nahīñ aatā tujhe kyā pesh karūñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
aqā.ed vahm haiñ maz.hab ḳhayāl-e-ḳhām hai saaqī
azal se zehn-e-insāñ basta-e-auhām hai saaqī
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
bahut ghuTan hai koī sūrat-e-bayāñ nikle
agar sadā na uThe kam se kam fuġhāñ nikle
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
barbād-e-mohabbat kī duā saath liye jā
TuuTā huā iqrār-e-vafā saath liye jā
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
bhaḌkā rahe haiñ aag lab-e-naġhmagar se ham
ḳhāmosh kyā raheñge zamāne ke Dar se ham
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
bhūle se mohabbat kar baiThā, nādāñ thā bechārā, dil hī to hai
har dil se ḳhatā ho jaatī hai, bigḌo na ḳhudārā, dil hī to hai
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
bujhā diye haiñ ḳhud apne hāthoñ mohabbatoñ ke diye jalā ke
mirī vafā ne ujaaḌ dī haiñ umiid kī bastiyāñ basā ke
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
chehre pe ḳhushī chhā jaatī hai āñkhoñ meñ surūr aa jaatā hai
jab tum mujhe apnā kahte ho apne pe ġhurūr aa jaatā hai
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
dekhā hai zindagī ko kuchh itnā qarīb se
chehre tamām lagne lage haiñ ajiib se
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
dekhā hai zindagī ko kuchh itne qarīb se
chehre tamām lagne lage haiñ ajiib se
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
dekhā to thā yūñhī kisī ġhaflat-shi.ār ne
dīvāna kar diyā dil-e-be-iḳhtiyār ne
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
duur rah kar na karo baat qarīb aa jaao
yaad rah jā.egī ye raat qarīb aa jaao
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
fan jo nādār tak nahīñ pahuñchā
abhī me.ayār tak nahīñ pahuñchā
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
gulshan gulshan phuul
dāman dāman dhuul
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
har-chand mirī quvvat-e-guftār hai mahbūs
ḳhāmosh magar tab-e-ḳhud-ārā nahīñ hotī
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
har qadam marhala-e-dār-o-salīb aaj bhī hai
jo kabhī thā vahī insāñ kā nasīb aaj bhī hai
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
har tarah ke jazbāt kā elaan haiñ āñkheñ
shabnam kabhī sho.ala kabhī tūfān haiñ āñkheñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
havas-nasīb nazar ko kahīñ qarār nahīñ
maiñ muntazir huuñ magar terā intizār nahīñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
is taraf se guzre the qāfile bahāroñ ke
aaj tak sulagte haiñ zaḳhm rahguzāroñ ke
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
itnī hasīn itnī javāñ raat kyā kareñ
jaage haiñ kuchh ajiib se jazbāt kyā kareñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
jab kabhī un kī tavajjoh meñ kamī paa.ī ga.ī
az-sar-e-nau dāstān-e-shauq dohrā.ī ga.ī
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
jurm-e-ulfat pe hameñ log sazā dete haiñ
kaise nādān haiñ sho.aloñ ko havā dete haiñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
kabhī ḳhud pe kabhī hālāt pe ronā aayā
baat niklī to har ik baat pe ronā aayā
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
ḳhuddāriyoñ ke ḳhuun ko arzāñ na kar sake
ham apne jauharoñ ko numāyāñ na kar sake
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
kyā jāneñ tirī ummat kis haal ko pahuñchegī
baḌhtī chalī jaatī hai ta.adād imāmoñ kī
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
lab pe pābandī to hai ehsās par pahrā to hai
phir bhī ahl-e-dil ko ahvāl-e-bashar kahnā to hai
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
maiñ zinda huuñ ye mushtahar kījiye
mire qātiloñ ko ḳhabar kījiye
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
maiñ zindagī kā saath nibhātā chalā gayā
har fikr ko dhueñ meñ uḌātā chalā gayā
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
merī taqdīr meñ jalnā hai to jal jā.ūñgā
terā va.ada to nahīñ huuñ jo badal jā.ūñgā
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
miltī hai zindagī meñ mohabbat kabhī kabhī
hotī hai dilbaroñ kī ināyat kabhī kabhī
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
mohabbat tark kī maiñ ne garebāñ sī liyā maiñ ne
zamāne ab to ḳhush ho zahr ye bhī pī liyā maiñ ne
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
na to zamīñ ke liye hai na āsmāñ ke liye
tirā vajūd hai ab sirf dāstāñ ke liye
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
parbatoñ ke peḌoñ par shaam kā baserā hai
surma.ī ujālā hai champa.ī añdherā hai
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
poñchh kar ashk apnī āñkhoñ se muskurāo to koī baat bane
sar jhukāne se kuchh nahīñ hotā sar uThāo to koī baat bane
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
sadiyoñ se insān ye suntā aayā hai
dukh kī dhuup ke aage sukh kā saayā hai
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
sansār kī har shai kā itnā hī fasāna hai
ik dhund se aanā hai ik dhund meñ jaanā hai
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
sansār se bhāge phirte ho bhagvān ko tum kyā pāoge
is lok ko bhī apnā na sake us lok meñ bhī pachhtāoge
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
sazā kā haal sunā.eñ jazā kī baat kareñ
ḳhudā milā ho jinheñ vo ḳhudā kī baat kareñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
sharmā ke yuuñ na dekh adā ke maqām se
ab baat baḌh chukī hai hayā ke maqām se
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
tañg aa chuke haiñ kashmakash-e-zindagī se ham
Thukrā na deñ jahāñ ko kahīñ be-dilī se ham
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
tarab-zāroñ pe kyā biitī sanam-ḳhānoñ pe kyā guzrī
dil-e-zinda tire marhūm armānoñ pe kyā guzrī
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
tirī duniyā meñ jiine se to behtar hai ki mar jaa.eñ
vahī aañsū vahī aaheñ vahī ġham hai jidhar jaa.eñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
toḌ leñge har ik shai se rishta toḌ dene kī naubat to aa.e
ham qayāmat ke ḳhud muntazir haiñ par kisī din qayāmat to aa.e
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
tum apnā ranj-o-ġham apnī pareshānī mujhe de do
tumheñ ġham kī qasam is dil kī vīrānī mujhe de do
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
ye vādiyāñ ye fazā.eñ bulā rahī haiñ tumheñ
ḳhamoshiyoñ kī sadā.eñ bulā rahī haiñ tumheñ
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
ye zamīñ kis qadar sajā.ī ga.ī
zindagī kī taḌap baḌhā.ī ga.ī
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
ye zulf agar khul ke bikhar jaa.e to achchhā
is raat kī taqdīr sañvar jaa.e to achchhā
author: — sahir ludhianvi

text:
aaj distā hai haal kuchh kā kuchh
kyuuñ na guzre ḳhayāl kuchh kā kuchh
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
aaj sarsabz koh o sahrā hai
har taraf sair hai tamāshā hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
āshiq ke mukh pe nain ke paanī ko dekh tuuñ
is ārasī meñ rāz-e-nihānī kuuñ dekh tuuñ
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
agar gulshan taraf vo nau-ḳhat-e-rañgīñ-adā nikle
gul o raihāñ suuñ rañg-o-bū shitābī peshvā nikle
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
bhaḌke hai dil kī ātish tujh neh kī havā suuñ
sho.ala namat jalā dil tujh husn-e-sho.ala-zā suuñ
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
chhupā huuñ maiñ sadā-e-bāñsulī meñ
ki tā jā.ūñ parī-rū kī galī meñ
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
dekhnā har sub.h tujh ruḳhsār kā
hai mutāla matla-e-anvār kā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
dil huā hai mirā ḳharāb-e-suḳhan
dekh kar husn-e-behijāb-e-suḳhan
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
dil kuuñ tujh baaj be-qarārī hai
chashm kā kaam ashk-bārī hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
dil talabgār-e-nāz-e-mah-vash hai
lutf us kā agarche dilkash hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
fidā-e-dilbar-e-rañgīñ-adā huuñ
shahīd-e-shāhid-e-gul-gūñ-qabā huuñ
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
huā zāhir ḳhat-e-rū-e-nigār āhista-āhista
ki jyuuñ gulshan meñ aatī hai bahār āhista-āhista
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
hue haiñ raam pītam ke nayan āhista-āhista
ki jyuuñ phāñde meñ aate haiñ hiran āhista-āhista
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
ishq betāb-e-jāñ-gudāzī hai
husn mushtāq-e-dil-navāzī hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
ishq meñ sabr-o-razā darkār hai
fikr-e-asbāb-e-vafā darkār hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
jab sanam kuuñ ḳhayāl-e-bāġh huā
tālib-e-nashsha-e-farāġh huā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
jab tujh araq ke vasf meñ jaarī qalam huā
aalam meñ us kā naañv javāhar-raqam huā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
jis dilrubā suuñ dil kuuñ mire ittihād hai
dīdār us kā merī añkhāñ kī murād hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
jise ishq kā tiir kaarī lage
use zindagī kyuuñ na bhārī lage
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
kamar us dilrubā kī dilrubā hai
nigah us ḳhush-adā kī ḳhush-adā hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
ḳhūb-rū ḳhuub kaam karte haiñ
yak nigah meñ ġhulām karte haiñ
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
kiyā mujh ishq ne zālim kuuñ aab āhista āhista
ki ātish gul kuuñ kartī hai gulāb āhista āhista
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
kūcha-e-yār ain kaasī hai
jogī-e-dil vahāñ kā baasī hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
maiñ āshiqī meñ tab suuñ afsāna ho rahā huuñ
terī nigah kā jab suuñ dīvāna ho rahā huuñ
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
maiñ tujhe aayā huuñ īmāñ buujh kar
bā.is-e-jam.iyyat-e-jāñ buujh kar
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
mat ġhusse ke sho.ale suuñ jalte kuuñ jalātī jā
Tuk mehr ke paanī suuñ tū aag bujhātī jā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
muflisī sab bahār khotī hai
mard kā e'tibār khotī hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
mushtāq haiñ ushshāq tirī bāñkī adā ke
zaḳhmī haiñ mohibbāñ tirī shamshīr-e-jafā ke
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
ruuh baḳhshī hai kaam tujh lab kā
dam-e-īsā hai naam tujh lab kā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
sajan Tuk naaz suuñ mujh paas aa āhista āhista
chhupī bāteñ apas dil kī sunā āhista āhista
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
shaġhl behtar hai ishq-bāzī kā
kyā haqīqī o kyā majāzī kā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
sharāb-e-shauq señ sarshār haiñ ham
kabhū be-ḳhud kabhū hushiyār haiñ ham
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
sohbat-e-ġhair muuñ jaayā na karo
dard-mandāñ kuuñ kuḌhāyā na karo
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
taḳht jis be-ḳhānamāñ kā dast-e-vīrānī huā
sar upar us ke bagūlā tāj-e-sultānī huā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
tirā lab dekh haivāñ yaad aave
tirā mukh dekh kan.āñ yaad aave
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
tirā majnūñ huuñ sahrā kī qasam hai
talab meñ huuñ tamannā kī qasam hai
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
tujh lab kī sifat la.al-e-badaḳhshāñ suuñ kahūñgā
jaadū haiñ tire nain ġhazālāñ suuñ kahūñgā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
vo nāznīñ adā meñ ejaaz hai sarāpā
ḳhūbī meñ gul-ruḳhāñ suuñ mumtāz hai sarāpā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
vo sanam jab suuñ basā dīda-e-hairān meñ aa
ātish-e-ishq paḌī aql ke sāmān meñ aa
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
yaad karnā har ghaḌī us yaar kā
hai vazīfa mujh dil-e-bīmār kā
author: — wali mohammad wali

text:
aate aate mirā naam sā rah gayā
us ke hoñToñ pe kuchh kāñptā rah gayā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
añdherā zehn kā samt-e-safar jab khone lagtā hai
kisī kā dhyān aatā hai ujālā hone lagtā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
apne andāz kā akelā thā
is liye maiñ baḌā akelā thā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
apne chehre se jo zāhir hai chhupā.eñ kaise
terī marzī ke mutābiq nazar aa.eñ kaise
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
apne har har lafz kā ḳhud ā.īna ho jā.ūñgā
us ko chhoTā kah ke maiñ kaise baḌā ho jā.ūñgā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
apne saa.e ko itnā samjhāne de
mujh tak mere hisse kī dhuup aane de
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
bhalā ġhamoñ se kahāñ haar jaane vaale the
ham āñsuoñ kī tarah muskurāne vaale the
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
biite hue din ḳhud ko jab dohrāte haiñ
ek se jaane ham kitne ho jaate haiñ
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
chāñd kā ḳhvāb ujāloñ kī nazar lagtā hai
tū jidhar ho ke guzar jaa.e ḳhabar lagtā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
chalo ham hī pahal kar deñ ki ham se bad-gumāñ kyuuñ ho
koī rishta zarā sī zid kī ḳhātir rā.egāñ kyuuñ ho
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
duā karo ki koī pyaas nazr-e-jām na ho
vo zindagī hī nahīñ hai jo nā-tamām na ho
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
dukh apnā agar ham ko batānā nahīñ aatā
tum ko bhī to andāza lagānā nahīñ aatā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
duur se hī bas dariyā dariyā lagtā hai
Duub ke dekho kitnā pyāsā lagtā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
hādsoñ kī zad pe haiñ to muskurānā chhoḌ deñ
zalzaloñ ke ḳhauf se kyā ghar banānā chhoḌ deñ
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
ham apne aap ko ik mas.ala banā na sake
isī liye to kisī kī nazar meñ aa na sake
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
hamārā azm-e-safar kab kidhar kā ho jaa.e
ye vo nahīñ jo kisī rahguzar kā ho jaa.e
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
haveliyoñ meñ mirī tarbiyat nahīñ hotī
to aaj sar pe Tapakne ko chhat nahīñ hotī
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
jahāñ dariyā kahīñ apne kināre chhoḌ detā hai
koī uThtā hai aur tūfān kā ruḳh moḌ detā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
kahāñ qatre kī ġham-ḳhvārī kare hai
samundar hai adākārī kare hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
kahāñ savāb kahāñ kyā azaab hotā hai
mohabbatoñ meñ kab itnā hisāb hotā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
khul ke milne kā salīqa aap ko aatā nahīñ
aur mere paas koī chor darvāza nahīñ
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
kitnā dushvār thā duniyā ye hunar aanā bhī
tujh se hī fāsla rakhnā tujhe apnānā bhī
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
kuchh itnā ḳhauf kā maarā huā bhī pyaar na ho
vo e'tibār dilā.e aur e'tibār na ho
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
kyā batā.ūñ kaisā ḳhud ko dar-ba-dar maiñ ne kiyā
umr-bhar kis kis ke hisse kā safar maiñ ne kiyā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
kyā dukh hai samundar ko batā bhī nahīñ saktā
aañsū kī tarah aañkh tak aa bhī nahīñ saktā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
lahū na ho to qalam tarjumāñ nahīñ hotā
hamāre daur meñ aañsū zabāñ nahīñ hotā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
maiñ āsmāñ pe bahut der rah nahīñ saktā
magar ye baat zamīñ se to kah nahīñ saktā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
maiñ apne ḳhvāb se bichhḌā nazar nahīñ aatā
to is sadī meñ akelā nazar nahīñ aatā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
maiñ is umiid pe Duubā ki tū bachā legā
ab is ke ba.ad mirā imtihān kyā legā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
maiñ ye nahīñ kahtā ki mirā sar na milegā
lekin mirī āñkhoñ meñ tujhe Dar na milegā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
mere ġham ko jo apnā batāte rahe
vaqt paḌne pe hāthoñ se jaate rahe
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
mirī vafāoñ kā nashsha utārne vaalā
kahāñ gayā mujhe hañs hañs ke hārne vaalā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
mohabbat nā-samajh hotī hai samjhānā zarūrī hai
jo dil meñ hai use āñkhoñ se kahlānā zarūrī hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
mujhe to qatra hī honā bahut satātā hai
isī liye to samundar pe rahm aatā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
nahīñ ki apnā zamāna bhī to nahīñ aayā
hameñ kisī se nibhānā bhī to nahīñ aayā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
rañg be-rañg hoñ ḳhushbū kā bharosa jaa.e
merī āñkhoñ se jo duniyā tujhe dekhā jaa.e
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
sab ne milā.e haath yahāñ tīrgī ke saath
kitnā baḌā mazāq huā raushnī ke saath
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
sabhī kā dhuup se bachne ko sar nahīñ hotā
har aadmī ke muqaddar meñ ghar nahīñ hotā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
shaam tak sub.h kī nazroñ se utar jaate haiñ
itne samjhautoñ pe jiite haiñ ki mar jaate haiñ
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
sirf terā naam le kar rah gayā
aaj dīvāna bahut kuchh kah gayā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
tahrīr se varna mirī kyā ho nahīñ saktā
ik tū hai jo lafzoñ meñ adā ho nahīñ saktā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
tumhārī raah meñ miTTī ke ghar nahīñ aate
isī liye to tumheñ ham nazar nahīñ aate
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
tū samajhtā hai ki rishtoñ kī duhā.ī deñge
ham to vo haiñ tire chehre se dikhā.ī deñge
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
udāsiyoñ meñ bhī raste nikāl letā hai
ajiib dil hai girūñ to sambhāl letā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
use samajhne kā koī to rāsta nikle
maiñ chāhtā bhī yahī thā vo bevafā nikle
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
vo mere ghar nahīñ aatā maiñ us ke ghar nahīñ jaatā
magar in ehtiyātoñ se ta.alluq mar nahīñ jaatā
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
vo mujh ko kyā batānā chāhtā hai
jo duniyā se chhupānā chāhtā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
ye hai to sab ke liye ho ye zid hamārī hai
is ek baat pe duniyā se jañg jaarī hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
zarā sā qatra kahīñ aaj agar ubhartā hai
samundaroñ hī ke lahje meñ baat kartā hai
author: — waseem barelvi

text:
zindagī tujh pe ab ilzām koī kyā rakkhe
apnā ehsās hī aisā hai jo tanhā rakkhe
author: — waseem barelvi
